演奏者的梦.say: （警报音）
火焰，爆炸与废墟，世界正在眼前扭曲变形着。
尖锐急促的警报声，钢铁倾轧的刺耳声，航弹落下的嘶鸣声。
鸢尾圣地，此刻宛如炼狱。
我这是……
斯特拉斯堡……终于找到你了！
呼……你没事吧，还好吗？
我……没事，大概。
尝试集中精神，脑海中只有无尽的恍惚。
“我是谁”，“我在哪里”，“我在做什么”，三大经典问题盘旋环绕着。
不对……至少我是斯特拉斯堡，第一个问题无需在意……
对啊，你是斯特拉斯堡啊……？
第一个问题又是什么……？
这里到底……发生了什么事……？
坏了坏了，不会被炸到头了吧？！
大家都保持冷静。斯特拉斯堡，深呼吸。告诉我，你最后记得的事是什么？
最后记得的事……
我们在准备联合演习，还有，之后的宴会……
我的身边环绕着鲜花、佳肴与音乐……
那都是两天前的事了啊？！
……总而言之，局势已经彻底失控了。
战火正在蔓延，我在路上慢慢跟你说……总之我们先逃离这里。
逃离……
没错，我们快逃吧！
一次距离极近的炮击。飞石掠过脸庞，让记忆也清晰了一些。
鸢尾，皇家，铁血与撒丁，四大阵营的联合演习……本该是一次加深阵营间交流的盛会。
为何……演变为了兵戎相向……
好不容易……终于摆脱了战火……
凯比尔港……土伦港……圣米歇尔山港……
我究竟还能逃去何处……战火究竟要追我到何处才能满意！
无情的炮火轻而易举压过了这声不甘的小小怒吼。
天旋地转，芳草如岩——
哈啊……！哈啊……哈啊……
光芒消散后，映入眼帘的是纱幕与柔和的阳光。
这里是……我的房间。
我还活着……这么说来，刚才的一切都是梦么。
一个逼真的噩梦……
少女用力摇了摇头，可是梦中的画面始终在眼前盘旋。
……以防万一，还是得去确认一下。
圣米歇尔山圣堂，一段时间后——
……斯特拉斯堡，你口中所说的噩梦，其实我也梦到了。
一样是阵营间的混战，一样是燃烧的海滩……
梦里的我也和你口中描述的一样，正在四处救人……而且，也确实找到了你……
呵呵呵……说不定是加班加过头出现的幻觉……怎么会有如此巧合的事。
……你也做了相同的梦么？
没错，和你们的噩梦一模一样。
……三个人同时做了同一个噩梦，这件事绝对不简单。
集体噩梦……倒是让我想到一件事——「陆上神国」。
难道和之前那次由马可波罗所引发的事件一样，我们又被某种异常现象波及了么？
侵蚀性络合物……
绝对没有。我在来的路上看得很清楚，天空、大海还有远方的陆地都一切正常。
……梦中提到的那个四大阵营间的联合演习，你们有听说过么？
没有，至少我完全没听说过这件事。
我也没有……
这样的话，应该就不用担心了。
噩梦的内容都是基于这场联合演习所展开的。如果连演习本身都不存在，那后面的事也就无需我们担心了。
说的也有道理……这么看的话，难道是单纯的巧合……？
怎么会有这么巧的事……
滴滴——
这是，克莱蒙梭阁下发来的消息……
说了些什么？
……圣座决定在圣米歇尔山港举行一场联合演习，并邀请了皇家、铁血、与撒丁帝国的舰队，时间定在两日之后。
演习之日，四大阵营都有高层会来，指挥官也会来……让我们做好迎接准备。
这、这不就是四大阵营的联合演习？！怎么真的要举办啊……？
……你们联系人员开始准备，我去联系克莱蒙梭阁下说明噩梦的事。
嗯。希望只是巧合，希望能一切顺利……

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港

联合演习的邀约.say: 自收到圣地亚哥司令部的联络后，又过了两日半。
第一日，也就是收到联络的当日，圣地亚哥司令部发来了“帕克菲克洋中的异常事件正在逐步平息，正在进行事后调查”的联络。
第二日，委托各阵营收集的情报也都陆续送达了秘书处。
然后在今日，由孟菲斯将整理后的报告递到了我的面前。
幻觉……幻觉……噩梦……突发狂躁……
突发狂躁……幻觉……噩梦……电子设备故障……
噩梦……幻觉……噩梦……噩梦……
嗯……果然不光是白鹰，帕克菲克洋周边的各阵营都出现了原因不明的异常情况。
情报只有这些了么？
经过筛选后的就是这些。
……还有一些我觉得是无效内容。比如都市传说、小道八卦一类的，就直接过滤掉了。
听上去确实没什么作为情报的价值。但——用来解闷倒是不错。
也拿来一起看看吧，我们的火车还要坐上一阵呢。
好的，稍等哦。
孟菲斯拿出终端开始了操作，很快，远超之前数量的文件被发了过来。
……收集到的八卦和都市传说还真不少。
说明各阵营的配合程度都比较高嘛~
咔哒咔哒——列车经过铁轨产生的震动声成为了阅读都市传说的天然伴奏。
车窗外掠过的沃野千里，则是尽显夏日风光。
要问此时，我为什么不在会场中参加另一场沉闷的会议，而是坐上了在原野中行驶的列车？
事情还要从昨日说起——
指挥官办公室，昨日——
指挥官……鸢尾的人刚刚送来了一封邀请函。
……邀请函，关于什么的？
似乎是要邀请您观摩位于某地举办的联合演习……？
这是正式的邀请函，请过目。
从海伦娜手中接过了那份印有教国徽记的邀请函。
……鸢尾、皇家、铁血、撒丁帝国四大阵营准备了一场联合演习，代号「和平间奏曲」。
……地点在鸢尾的圣米歇尔山港，需要明日乘坐火车前去。
指挥官，我刚去做了些调查。
这场演习似乎是在前日伊丽莎白女王访问会场后，由皇家与鸢尾一起突然决定的。
（一起突然决定……难道说，这场演习原本是用来给我参加狩猎行动拖延时间的？）
（可是因为狩猎结束的比预期要早，所以才变成了现在这样类似在会议途中突然郊游观光的情况了么……）
也好，既然鸢尾已经发来了邀请函，我们没有拒绝的理由。
就当是对于沉闷会议的调剂，我们一同去散散心吧。
指挥官的包厢，此刻——
对了，孟菲斯，你有什么闭源消息么？
嗯？为什么突然这么问？您是指……关于哪方面的？
关于异常事件的，关于帕克菲克洋周边的，或者任何我现在还不知道——但是你觉得我知道之后会更好的？
唔……与异常事件相关的消息我确实也不知道更多了。
再怎么说，我的消息来源也不可能比萨拉托加更厉害。
关于帕克菲克洋周边的话，也没什么……
哦对，有一件事……差不多正好是在你忙于接待伊丽莎白女王的那阵子？
指挥官，你知道么，重樱突然进行了一连串密集的外交攻势。
重樱开始进行外交攻势了？我倒确实是还没听说，怎么回事？
似乎是重樱高层终于想通了什么，因此对于联盟合并的态度有所转变。
听说……给个各阵营都送上了价值昂贵的国礼呢。
嗯……这倒是个重要情报，重樱终于有积极的行动了啊。
（不过尚不清楚重樱内部产生这一变化的原因，回头向信浓去打探一下吧。）
咚咚咚——（敲门声）
请进。
诸位打扰了~指挥官阁下，黎塞留圣座邀请您前往她的包厢用餐。
——如果您方便的话。
当然。不过……
您无需担心~稍后，我们会将孟菲斯小姐和海伦娜小姐的午餐直接带至您的包厢中。
指挥官你去忙吧，我们就在包厢里悠闲地看看风景就好~
嗯……不用担心我们。
（看来……她们到底还是有所图，这场观摩演习之旅不是单纯的放松那么简单。）
（也好，就去看看吧。）

悠闲午餐会.say: 推开包厢门后，美食的香气迎面而来。
闻上去，本日列车上供应的午餐似乎是撒丁风味——
指挥官，欢迎您的到来，请入座吧。
包厢中，黎塞留与伊丽莎白相对而坐。维内托与伊丽莎白相邻，而与维内托相对之处正好空着一个位置。
（连座位都安排好了啊。）
指挥官，之前都是在会议室和各种大型场合与您匆匆见面。
今天终于有机会和您面对面闲聊一番了。
本日的午餐是我特意准备的，所有的食材都由帝国本土空运而来，希望您能喜欢。
（看来黎塞留的这场邀约，主要目的是为了创造维内托与我的会面机会……？）
撒丁菜系在是欧罗巴可是自成一派，相当不错哦。
本王十分推荐你尝尝！
唔嗯……也得让女仆队多学习学习，偶尔给本王换换胃口~
（另一方面，伊丽莎白好像单纯就是来蹭饭的……算了，正好也饿了，边吃边聊吧。）
席间，我们一边享受着美食，一边有一搭没一搭地闲聊着。
从陆上神国事件的顺利解决，再到联盟合并会议的成功召开，指挥官对于撒丁帝国的帮助实在难以用语言尽述。
我深知，仅仅一顿便饭的招待自然是远远不够的。
不知道日后指挥官有没有前往我国的计划呢？
届时也好让我一尽地主之谊，为您带来一场难以忘怀的罗马假日。
本王也要带女仆队一起去！之前光注意鸢尾菜系了，没想到原汁原味的撒丁菜果真是别有一番风味。
确实值得本王亲自去品味一下！
女王陛下要来的话，是我们的荣幸。撒丁帝国一定会尽全力招待您的。
很好~很好！
（看来，伊丽莎白真的就是来吃饭的……！）
（倒是黎塞留，明明是她发出的邀约……却十分寡言。难道是在等我先开口？）
（嗯……饭局进行到这里，闲聊也确实可以告一段落了。）
黎塞留，还有诸位。其实关于这场联合演习，我还有些不明白的点。
指挥官，但说无妨。
最大的疑问便是，为什么要突然举行这场联合演习？
作为一场涉及四个阵营的大型活动，时间上似乎有些过于仓促了。
本王就是如此任性，想要弄就弄了，这个解释还不够么？
对外说明肯定够了，对我来说——还缺点说服力。
这场联合演习准备的确实仓促了一些，不过……也是受到形式变化所迫。
相信指挥官已经听闻了重樱近日的行动，我们也是想立刻做出些应对而已。
联合演习能够增进四大阵营的团结度。
而克服了种种不利条件依然成功举行，则能够向外界展示我们合作的紧密度。
如果我们欧罗巴的四大阵营形成攻守同盟的话，后面的事也会好办许多不是么？
（所谓攻守同盟，进可攻，退可守。）
（进自不必说，在联盟合并取得成功，秩序重组之时，取得更大的话语权。）
（至于退……则是协商以失败告终，但是这四家依然有退路……或许是计划各自退出现有体系成立新的同盟？）
……看来，你们对于本次联合演习赋予了非同寻常的象征意义呢。
可是现在还缺一个人，铁血的俾斯麦不来么？
她会来的。
因为考虑到路线的便利性，她计划直接去演习地点与我们汇合。
（自从联盟合并会议开始后，俾斯麦一直在铁血本土远程观察着会议的进程，一次都没有前往过会场。）
（这次居然决定亲自前来参加皇家与鸢尾“一时兴起”举办的活动……）
（看来刚才的猜测，恐怕确实是对的……）
（一个全新的阵营……么。）
就这样，包厢中悠闲的午餐会继续进行着——

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港

和平间奏曲.say: 阳光明媚，晴空万里。圣米歇尔山上，四大阵营的旗帜随风飘扬。
此刻，各舰队所属的量产型和舰船依次就位，「和平间奏曲」演习即将开始。
呜……通宵、加班、加班、通宵……总算按时准备好了。
目前为止都没有出现什么差错……真是太好了。
了不起哦，迪普莱克斯。
不过也“只是到目前为止”，演习才刚刚开始呢。
我知道我知道，阶段性安心，阶段性安心嘛……
呼……接下来该专心处理演习本身上了。
这次赛制要求每支队伍依次与其他三支队伍交手，不根据战果做排名，完成流程就算圆满结束。
倒确实算是体现友好交流的设计。
但是没有假定目标，直接拿彼此当做假想敌是不是有些……
咳，这件事得换一个角度看。
没有什么比面对面直接交手更能看出彼此的优势和劣势了吧？
嗯——有道理。那我们就准备出发吧。
本次演习由我们鸢尾舰队最先开始，黎塞留大人也在圣堂会场看着我们，打起精神来。
……斯特拉斯堡？
抱歉。我刚刚走神了。
嗯……你说的没错。大家打起精神来，我们出发。
鸢尾教国的诸位，贵安。
贵安，皇家女仆队的诸位，欢迎来到圣米歇尔山。
早就听闻鸢尾圣米歇尔山圣堂的宏伟与壮丽，今日一见果真名不虚传。
多谢夸奖，各位客人能够喜欢就好。
咳……赫敏，好像不是应该互道寒暄的时候。
欸~确实如此，是我疏忽了。
那么鸢尾教国的诸位，就让我们开始正式的演习日程吧？
诸位，请——
呼……看来这场战斗是诸位的胜利。
真是一场精彩的战斗，诸位的表现也可圈可点。
我们彼此的优势与劣势已经在刚才战斗中充分暴露，期待一会与你们的第二场战斗。
嗯……我们会做好准备的，等待我们的再次挑战吧。
皇家舰队重整队形后，离开了这片水域。
呼……大家辛苦了。
接下来我们修整一下，然后前往铁血舰队所在海域，迎接下一场战斗。
诸位，就到此为止，不要再接近了。
居然是改造舰队……在演习名单里可不是这么写的。
但是我们参加人员确实和名单完全一致，不是么？
有趣的惊喜，没想到除了皇家之外，铁血也已经组建起了改造舰队。
这是我们第一次以改造舰队的形式参加战斗，对于战斗情况我们也很期待。
所以请各位不要保留实力，让我们全力一战吧！
正合我意——
没想到这场战斗会变得如此焦灼……量产型全军覆没，我们所有人也都挂了彩。
如果算积分的话……唉，是铁血小胜啊。
不愧是改造舰队。不但单艘舰船的实力远超改造前，集结成舰队更是进一步放大了优势。
你、你们也很厉害啦……
那么接下来我们就去修整一下，然后等待诸位之后的复仇战了？
嗯，等着我们的复仇吧~
铁血舰队重整队形后，离开了这片水域。
呼……接下来是由我们作为进攻方的最后一场战斗。
目前是战绩是1胜1负，下一场可绝对不能输啊。
迪普莱克斯，别太有压力。这次演习目的是友好交流，不要太看重输赢。
况且这轮之后，我们还会作为防守方再战两场呢。
嗯。大家修整一下，然后我们前往撒丁帝国舰队所在的海域，迎接下一场战斗。
咔嚓——
演习瞬间《迎风而来的鸢尾舰队》记录完毕~
哇哦……这张拍的真是英姿飒爽啊！搞不好有评奖的潜质呢……
嘿嘿，我也是这么觉得的~
……记者？
记者，兼撒丁帝国演习成员阿尔弗雷多·奥里亚尼~旁边的这两位是加里波第和伟大的庞培！
幸会。
接下来就由我，伟大的庞培来亲自会会你们！
鸢尾的挑战者哟，亮出你们的光刃吧！
……光刃？
就、就是那些嘛……你们鸢尾不是经常有各种发光亮闪闪的武器……不就是光刃！
……像这样？
没错、没错！
咔嚓——
演习瞬间《亮出光刃的鸢尾骑士》记录完毕~
……怎么一到撒丁帝国这里画风就变了？
同感。我说啊——这里可是鸢尾教国的地盘，严格来说，远道而来的诸位才是挑战者哦？
哼，很有气势嘛。多说无益，战场上见真章吧！
……好弱。
伟大的庞培……居然输了。
啊哈哈哈……真是一场势均力敌的精彩战斗啊！
咳，友谊第一，比赛第二不是嘛！输赢不重要，不重要啦~
阿尔弗雷多，你是最先出局的，回去该特训了。
这次是我故意放水！一会……一会看我的厉害！
我还准备了秘密作战计划呢！
秘密作战计划……听上很有趣啊。
实际执行起来更有趣，你们就等着看吧！
那我们就期待一下咯~
嗯嗯，敬请期待吧，那么一会见~
撒丁帝国舰队重整队形后，离开了这片水域。
至此鸢尾舰队作为进攻方的三场战斗结束了。但演习日程，尚未过半——

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港
圣堂会场·指挥官的包厢

与“宰相”的密谈.say: 屏幕之上，多架部署在海域中的无人机正不间断传回着演习海域的战斗画面。
后台的演习分析系统也在根据战斗结果，在屏幕上对战局进行着实时标注。
此刻，鸢尾舰队正在与铁血的改造舰队战斗着，局面难解难分。
这么一看，改造舰果然很厉害。只是巡洋舰就可以和战列巡洋舰的斯特拉斯堡打得有来有回……
不知道我们什么时候才能成规模列装改造舰队啊~
（舰装改造技术与II型舰装技术有一定相似性，但难度却低很多。）
（在II型舰装普及遇到瓶颈的当下，尽可能研发更多的改造型舰装倒确实是一项能够快速提升战斗力的方案……）
（……那名黑发少女就是在陆上神国战役期间没有向黎塞留致电的斯特拉斯堡么。）
（虽然早就听说过她的名字，亲眼见到还是第一次……）
（……她看上去似乎有些心神不宁，并没有将全部的精力放在战斗中。）
（难道是因为黎塞留亲自前来观摩的原因么……？）
咚咚咚——（敲门声）
请进。
指挥官阁下，俾斯麦大人邀请您前往她的包厢一同观看这场演习，不知道您可否赏光？
（我还在想俾斯麦什么时候会发来会面邀请呢……没想到用的是这个理由。）
自然没问题，请带路吧。
圣堂会场·俾斯麦的包厢

options.content: 这还是第一次面对面谈话呢，俾斯麦。

与“宰相”的密谈.say: 不必拘谨，随便坐吧，指挥官。
自从安塔迪卡战役之后——确实也有段时间了呢，好久不见。
是啊，铁血的领袖和碧蓝航线的指挥官同处一个包厢之中，真是一个放在过去难以想象的画面。
你的这副样子……难道革律翁出了什么问题？
啊~无需担心，Zwei型舰装和革律翁一切正常。
我选用这副装备前来，只是为了看上去更柔和些，算是制造亲近感的小策略。
毕竟，此处是鸢尾教国的领土呢。
带了一支改造舰队来参加演习——也是为了增加亲近感？
一码归一码。
既然是为了增进了解的演习，那我自然要让各家多了解一下铁血，以免误判。不是么？
你的言下之意……和这场四大阵营联合演习想要对外展现出的意图似乎有些偏差啊？
毕竟是在谈同盟的事，谨慎些总是好的。
所以至少攻守同盟的事确有其事……？
我不否认。
我们针对塞壬的战争，至少针对实验机关的战争已经步入尾声，该考虑之后的事了。
这个“之后的事”，我以为是现在各大阵营在一同推进的「联盟合并」才是？
你真的相信靠开会能解决问题么？
如果能解决的话，当年的碧蓝航线又如何会分裂呢？
塞壬的阴谋已经摆在了明面上，如今形式已经与当年不同了。
难道当年各大阵营就真的什么都不知道么？
其实你也不相信联盟合并能够依靠会议取得成功，所以现在才会出现在我的包厢里吧。
……至少，我真心希望各阵营能够形成一个统一的联盟，一同面对未来。
即便这个联盟不是——「碧蓝航线」？
……「碧蓝航线」不光是一个名字，更是一种传承。
我认为它……至少应该叫「碧蓝航线」。
您的态度我清楚了，感谢您的坦诚。
我看更像是在你的逼问下被迫交代底线吧？
呵呵，我们不只是在观看演习的包厢中随便聊聊么？
那说回上一个话题。刚才我说我们针对“实验机关的战争已经步入了尾声。”你没反对呢。
虽然就各处海域的局势而言，塞壬依然掌控着强大的军事力量，但是它们的死穴其实已经为我们所知了。
在安塔迪卡战役之中暴露出来的塞壬最应该隐藏的秘密——观察者主机的位置。
没错。多次战役已经证明，只要我们能够团结一致，就有与塞壬正面一战并取得胜利的能力。
而只要消灭了观察者的主机塔，扎根于我们世界中的整个塞壬实验机关也就不足为惧了。
所以——你打算怎么做？
我……打算怎么做？
是顺势而为，在日后的某场战役中一劳永逸的摧毁塞壬，亦或是……
——对抗塞壬就会产生伤亡，我绝对不做养寇自重这种事。
您的为人我很清楚，我自然不会不识趣地对您提出这种建议。
那你的意思是……？
除了彻底消灭与养寇自重之外，还有一种选择——将其为自己所用。
你是指……要掌控塞壬的实验机关？！
我只是在谈论一种可能性，也希望你能考虑一下。
塞壬，或者它们的另一个名字安蒂克丝，原本就是为了对抗X而存在的兵器。
如果能为我们所用的话，未来的胜算也会大一些。
虽然你没有将X的细节告知于我，不过那恐怕不是什么能够轻易对抗的敌人吧？
……嗯，你的建议，我会考虑的。
（……狩猎结束后，在海伦娜的要求下，所有在行动中目击X了的人都在充分知情并同意的情况下，被她施加了某种情报干涉。）
（以免关于X的详细情报因意外泄露而产生无法挽回的后果……）
（至于在主动分享中，也只提到了X的名字和其是新的敌人这种最小限度的情报，分享的人员也被控制在了最小范围内。）
关于X的情报确实十分危险。知道的越详细，X出现的可能性就越高。
不过等有朝一日，在合适的时候，我一定会向诸位和盘托出的。
不急不急~关于X情报的危险性伊丽莎白和黎塞留都已经不知道反复跟我强调了多少遍了。
这件事上按照你的节奏来就好，铁血绝对不会主动调查的。
滴滴——
这个时候的通讯联络……呵呵，是小秘书等急了，还是怕您在我这里遭遇不测？
只是普通的工作联络而已。不过——我确实也差不多该回去了。
在走之前，我还有一件公事要传达。
作为碧蓝航线的指挥官和由指挥部委派的联盟合并会议委员会成员——
在当面见到你之后，我有义务向你传达碧蓝航线指挥部的要求。
我在听，请讲。
碧蓝航线指挥部期望，铁血不要忘记此前已经约定好的诸项事宜，并尽早着手履行。
放心吧，我没忘。该加的协议，该吐的地盘，我都在安排了。
……没想到你会如此干脆。
你看，铁血对于联盟合并也是有着充分诚意的吧~？
况且……这是为了铁血彻底摆脱塞壬枷锁所必须要做的事。
也是为了让我们的世界以更好的姿态面对未来的挑战应该做的事。
铁血不会逃避，亦不会打折。
感谢您的深明大义，那我就如此汇报给指挥部了。
呵呵，请务必如此哦~
话题既然谈到了这里——指挥官，一旦铁血履行了约定，世界局势可是要迎来一轮巨大的变化哦？
为了迎接这轮名为“新生”的风暴，各大阵营想必已经在准备自己的条件了，你呢？
呵呵，这次随铁血代表团一同前来的，就有郁金王国的代表。
一直以来，郁金王国都没能得到军舰舰船化的机会。
不知道指挥官在晚宴之上，有没有兴趣交些新朋友呢~？

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港

宴会与之后的夜.say: 符合鸢尾刻板印象的华丽大厅中，一场招待晚宴正在柔和的乐声中进行着——
不得不说，餐点算是颇有水平。
明明是临时决定的日程，准备的倒是真不错。
嗯，确实有心了。
呵呵，面对此等盛会，自然是不能马虎的。
正在演奏音乐的人，好像是斯特拉斯堡？
嗯，是她。经过了一天的劳累，原本她是应该坐在观众席上好好放松一下的。
不过她说演奏就是最好的放松，也就随她了。
原来如此。
乐声如细水般自琴弦潺潺而出，在大厅中肆意流淌着。
沉浸在音乐中的黑发少女，已然没有了白天那般心神不宁的神色。
不得不说……这位美丽的演奏者，着实为这场宴会确实增色了不少。
呵呵，指挥官喜欢便好。
此刻，就让我们暂时忘却烦恼，一同欣赏这场美妙的乐音吧。
指挥官休息室，晚宴之后——
咚咚咚——（敲门声）
指挥官，黎塞留……圣座让我来找您。
……嗯？黎塞留是有什么事么？
嗯……不过，其实也算是我自己的事了。
……这几日，我一直噩梦缠身。不光是我，我身边的人也一样。
黎塞留大人说您对于梦境的事比较了解……而且正在调查与梦境有关的异常现象，所以让我前来向您汇报。
原来如此……噩梦是从什么时候开始的？
两日前出现了第一次噩梦。
（两日前……也就是23号，或者22号夜……？）
（收到圣地亚哥司令部奇怪报告的时间也是22日……）
（可是，受到异常现象影响的应该仅限于帕克菲克洋周边才对，这里可是欧罗巴啊……？）
请坐，不用紧张。把噩梦的内容详细说一下吧。
一段时间后——
大概就是这些了……
（三个人做了同一个梦，而且提前梦到了联合演习的事……）
（果然是非同寻常的梦……）
斯特拉斯堡，你提供的情报十分有用。
白天在演习中，我看你有些心神不宁，也是因为噩梦的影响么？
嗯……没想到您连这点小事都注意到了，不愧是指挥官。
不过——下手时倒是没受到丝毫影响，为我们贡献了一连串精彩的战斗呢。
咳、嗯……多谢您的夸奖~
今天你已经很累了，早点回去休息吧。噩梦的事我会继续调查的。
如果今夜又做噩梦的话，明天一定要再来找我。
好的~那我就不打扰了，指挥官也好好休息哦。
……说到噩梦，那可没有人比她更懂噩梦了。
信浓今日也来到了圣米歇尔山港，去找她问问吧——

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港

圣堂的秘密.say: 进入重樱休息室后，发现信浓似乎正在做出门的准备。
真是奇妙，妾身正打算动身去找汝，汝却自己来了。
指挥官，汝此行前来是有什么事要问妾身么？
确实有一件事，不过你先说吧。
也好。指挥官，妾身在来到这座鸢尾的圣米歇尔山圣堂后，产生了一种熟悉的感觉。
此处……似乎有「海若」的碎片存在。
鸢尾的圣堂之中……有重樱神石碎片的存在……？
嗯——大概如此。汝且看，妾身的护符就是由神石碎片雕刻而成。
妾身虽然无法感应到此处碎片的明确位置……不过感觉本身不会错。
信浓说着，随手拿出了一个翠绿的方形护符。护符之上，经过雕琢的勾玉与樱花图案清晰可见。
倒是有个方法能够快速解决这个疑惑……
等我联系一下克莱蒙梭，相信这个点她肯定还没睡呢。
这不是指挥官么，还有信浓阁下也在。出什么事了么？
那倒没有，只是有件事想跟你核实一下。
在圣米歇尔山的圣堂之中，是否存放有重樱神石「海若」的碎片？
哦？没想到你才来不到一日，居然连这座圣堂中隐藏最深的秘密都发现了。
你是怎么发现的？
居然真的有……其实是因为信浓感应到了神石碎片的存在，我只是来找你确认一下。
“感应”么……有趣。
过去的维希教廷时期，因为同为赤色中轴阵营， 重樱曾经与我们签订了一系列的技术交流协议。
位于圣米歇尔山圣堂中的神石碎片也是当时依据协议交换过来的。
先是铁血，然后是维希教廷……重樱是不是用神石碎片跟赤色中轴的每一个阵营都做过交换啊……？
撒丁帝国那边据我所知是没有的。
不过你也清楚，腓特烈大帝掌控铁血的时候，我对于审判庭的掌控力远不如现在这般牢固。
信浓，你对这件事有所了解么？
妾身……连神石碎片曾经被用来与铁血做过交易的事都不清楚。
好吧……
（维内托也在演习会场，撒丁帝国的事倒是可以去问问她。）
（不过鉴于撒丁内部的实际情况……就算真的曾经有过交换协议，维内托也未必一定知道就是了。）
（陆上神国事件至今仍有些疑点未能查明……）
（果然……还是得尽快想办法唤醒马可波罗。）
指挥官，如果你很在意这件事的话，我可以着手去调查。
倒也不用，刚才只是随口一问。
大晚上麻烦你了，我这边没有其他事了，你早点休息。
嗯，你们也是哦~
克莱蒙梭阁下，妾身……明日可以去看一下位于此处的神石碎片么？
自然可以。明天你去找斯特拉斯堡吧，我会安排好的。
多谢。
指挥官，妾身的疑惑已经得到了解答，该来谈谈汝之事了。
其实——
又是噩梦么……
其实，妾身日前也做了一个噩梦。
妾身认为，梦境的世界正在崩溃中燃烧……有什么非常之事要发生了。
……“非常之事”？我们必须得尽快调查清楚。
信浓，你今夜能去梦中调查一下么？
很遗憾，自从那个噩梦之后……妾身就不再做梦了。
妾身……似乎已经失去了对于梦境的控制权。
梦境也不愿再向妾身展示任何景象了……
不过，妾身可以询问一下武藏……或许能有所收获。
……那就麻烦了。
（没想到信浓竟然会对这些“噩梦”束手无策……）
（看来，接连出现的噩梦确实是某种危险事态正在迫近的预兆。）
（海伦娜正在忙于稳定罗德尼的情况……暂时只能靠自己了。）
（接下来……该怎么办呢，）

「她」存在的梦.say: 紫色的夜空下，映入眼帘的是无边无际的白。
斯特拉斯堡，黎塞留主教带领的自由鸢尾舰队已经抵达，此刻正在清理前往首都的道路。
克莱蒙梭主教也发布了行动命令，要求我们净化圣米歇尔山圣堂，启动节点设备，配合黎塞留主教的行动。
……这一天还是来了。
是啊……终于来了。
真是选了一个合适的时机……
……一个能够将旧的一切都果断抛开，重新开始的时机。
没错，鸢尾终于要重新开始了！
斯特拉斯堡，各地的教廷驻军正在陆续向黎塞留主教发去贺电，我们什么时候发？
我们不发。
克莱蒙梭主教给我们的任务只有净化圣堂，以及启动节点设备而已。
……出发吧。
黑发少女在白色中艰难地开辟着道路。
怎么回事……越是接近圣堂，心中的感情就愈发难以抑制。
……这种感情是什么？喜悦……愤怒……欣慰……不甘？
从离开到归来……一切都顺理成章，又是如此不讲道理。
……如果，我再强大一些。
强大到能够影响这场棋局……过去的那些悲剧，或许能少发生些。
这一日，或许也能更早到来……
届时……此刻涌动在心中的感情……恐怕只会有激动与喜悦了吧。
似乎受到感受到了斯特拉斯堡涌动的情绪，被白色物质覆盖的圣堂突然迸发出耀眼的光芒。
圣洁的光芒将周边的白色一扫而空，令人熟悉又安心的夜色回归了。
圣堂……对于我的心意做出了回应。守护着鸢尾的诸圣也是如此认为的么！
还不够，对于漫漫长夜来说，光芒还不够……！
我要尽快……尽快到达那里！
夜色下，快步而行的少女消失在光芒中——
阴云下，肃杀的气氛笼罩了凯比尔港。
相信我们此次前来的原因贵方已经很清楚了。
由于种种不可抗的原因，我们希望你们在未来能够更加配合我们反抗铁血的行动。
你们有四种选择。
一、立刻出港，加入皇家舰队，继续对抗铁血与赤色中轴。
二、解除武装，开往皇家港口，我们会保证你们的安全。
三、在我们的护送下，加入白鹰联邦，解除武装。
四、立刻自沉，这是我们并不希望看到的。
这算是你们的最后通牒吗？……如果所有的条件我们都无法接受呢？
那么我们只能遵照司令部的命令，用武力解除你们的威胁了。
我给你们考虑的时间，希望你们能做出明智的决定。
欺人太甚……敦刻尔克，我们绝不屈服。
那是自然。纵使局势不利……我们亦要奋战至最后一刻。
嗯……奋战至最后一刻。
看来，诸位陷入了困局之中呢。
你是……？
▇ ▇ ▇ ▇阁下，没想到会将您卷到这种事情里来。
您不是鸢尾骑士，不必与我们一同在此死战，还请从陆路撤离吧。
亲眼见到了这种事，叫我如何能够转身离开呢？
其实，你们还有一条路可以选哦——一条解决眼下困局的最佳之路。
请▇ ▇ ▇ ▇阁下不吝赐教。
吓退她们。我此次前来，可不是孤身前来，还记得么？
伴随着轰鸣声，一艘又一艘巨舰从船坞中驶出，在皇家舰队与鸢尾舰队之间形成了一道屏障。
（黑色的……巨舰？这些船是什么……什么时候来的？）
作为技术交流的一环随我一同前来的，斯特拉斯堡小姐不记得了么？
欸……好像确实有这回事？
呵呵~没错，确有其事哦。
我的舰队，加上诸位的舰队，对上皇家的H舰队——诸位觉得有几成胜算？
完全有一战之力。
呵呵~皇家的诸位呢？
……重樱的▇ ▇ ▇ ▇阁下，皇家会牢记这笔账的。
H舰队的诸位，我们撤。
呵呵~一路走好，不送哦。
这到底是怎么回事……头……好乱。
斯特拉斯堡小姐，从刚才开始就见你一直心神不宁的。
皇家舰队已经离开了，你还有什么担心的事么？
那倒没有，只是……
“只是”？噢~我知道了，你昨夜做了个噩梦，对么？
……噩梦？
海上骑士自诞生之时起便宣誓效忠圣座与信仰，我们不会听令于任何异邦人的指令！
包括铁血和撒丁帝国，我们发誓绝不为其所用，绝不成为他们口中侵略的獠牙！
……曾经的盟友居然连这种程度的承诺都无法信任么。
皇家舰队不值得信任，我们将战斗到最后一刻！
凯比尔港的惨案已经给予了我们答案。
骄傲的圣教骑士不会和他们同流合污，骄傲的天之子民绝不会向淫威屈服。
前有狼，后有虎，现在是存亡的最后时刻。
勇敢的圣教骑士绝不低头，绝不成为任何人的傀儡！
以自由之名，我命令，陆间海全军舰队，就地自沉，就地自沉！
是啊……做了一场噩梦。
一场很长……很长的噩梦。
还好你醒过来了呢。
不用担心，不管噩梦有多可怕，只要醒过来就没事了。
嗯……只要醒过来就没事了。
好啦~走吧，我很期待今夜的晚宴之上斯特拉斯堡小姐的演奏哦。
呵呵~一定不会让您失望的，▇ ▇ ▇ ▇阁下——

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山车站

美好的一日.say: 列车的晃动在不知不觉间停止了，耳边依稀传来了刹车的声音。
指挥官……我们已经到站，该起来了。
睁开双眼，映入眼帘的是一片黑暗。
（这是……眼罩？）
摘下眼罩，柔和的光芒映入眼帘。车窗外，屹立在水中的宏伟圣堂清晰可见。
嘿嘿~是我给你戴上的。
之前在坐车的时候你非要坚持办公，结果没多久就睡着了。
所以就干脆给你戴个眼罩让你休息得更好些咯~
哼哼~这也是秘书分内的工作，不用客气。
您休息得好，那便一切都好~
那我们就准备下车吧？精彩的联合演习正在等着我们呢~
喂喂喂……这是刚睡醒的人第一句该说的话么？！
准确来说，已经是第二句了……
欸——剩下的工作都被我全部消灭了，指挥官，忘了它们吧。
好啦好啦，快下车吧。精彩的联合演习正在等着我们呢~

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港
圣堂会场·指挥官的包厢

美好的一日.say: 屏幕之上，多架部署在海域中的无人机正不间断传回着演习海域的战斗画面。
后台的演习分析系统也在根据战斗结果，在屏幕上对战局进行着实时标注。
此刻，鸢尾舰队正在与铁血的改造舰队战斗着，局面难解难分。
这么一看，改造舰果然很厉害。只是巡洋舰就可以和战列巡洋舰的斯特拉斯堡打得有来有回……
不知道我们什么时候才能成规模列装改造舰队啊~
咚咚咚——（敲门声）
请进。
指挥官阁下，俾斯麦大人邀请您前往她的包厢一同观看这场演习，不知道您可否赏光？
圣堂会场·俾斯麦的包厢
不必拘谨，随便坐吧，指挥官。
是啊，铁血的领袖和碧蓝航线的指挥官同处一个包厢之中，真是一个放在过去难以想象的画面。
啊~无需担心，Zwei型舰装和革律翁一切正常。
我选用这副装备前来，只是为了看上去更柔和些，算是制造亲近感的小策略。
毕竟，此处是鸢尾教国的领土呢。
一码归一码。
既然是为了增进了解的演习，那我自然要让各家多了解一下铁血，以免误判。不是么？
毕竟是在谈同盟的事，谨慎些总是好的。
我不否认。
我们针对塞壬的战争，至少针对实验机关的战争已经步入尾声，该考虑之后的事了。
你真的相信靠开会能解决问题么？
如果能解决的话，当年的碧蓝航线又如何会分裂呢？
难道当年各大阵营就真的什么都不知道么？
其实你也不相信联盟合并能够依靠会议取得成功，所以现在才会出现在我的包厢里吧。
呵呵，我知道你心中所想。
不用担心，铁血会支持你达成所愿的，不管使用何种手段，造成何种后果——

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港

美好的一日.say: 符合鸢尾刻板印象的华丽大厅中，一场招待晚宴正在柔和的乐声中进行着——
不得不说，餐点算是颇有水平。
明明是临时决定的日程，准备的倒是真不错。
嗯，确实有心了。
呵呵，面对此等盛会，自然是不能马虎的。
音乐在不知不觉间悄然而止，黑发的演奏者来到了餐桌旁。
审判庭所属，演奏者，斯特拉斯堡，感谢您今日莅临圣米歇尔山圣堂。
呵呵，您能喜欢我的演奏是我的荣幸~
不知接下来——我能否有幸与您共舞一曲呢~？

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港

美好的一日.say: 美好的一日结束了。
而明日，亦是美好的新一天——

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港

亦是美好一日？.say: ……嗯…………已经这个时间了么。
从洒入房间的阳光强度推断，时间已接近正午。
没错哦，已经快到午饭的时间了。
指挥官，你难得睡到这么晚呢~看来这趟出差真是出对了。
呼……嗯，确实很久没有睡得这么舒服了。
斯特拉斯堡上午来找过我么？
嗯？斯特拉斯堡小姐么？没有哦。
（没来么，看来她昨晚也睡了个好觉啊。）
指挥官，午餐已经安排好了。
回程的火车因为定在下午，如果你餐后想去圣堂中参观一下，时间上也是完全充裕的哦。
（倒确实有个需要去看看的地方，等餐后叫上信浓一起去吧——）
午餐后，在前去找信浓的路上偶遇了黑发的演奏者。
指挥官，贵安。
是斯特拉斯堡啊，昨夜睡得还好么？
呵呵，或许是因为在宴会上与您共舞的缘故，一夜都是美梦呢。
共舞……一曲？
昨日你不是一直都在演奏……直至宴会闭幕么？
嗯？指挥官难道是睡糊涂了么，昨日的演奏很早就结束了，
之后，我们一起共舞了许久哦？
（是……这样么？）
脑海中，昨日与斯特拉斯堡共舞的景象历历在目。
您是打算在临走前参观一下圣米歇尔山圣堂么？
……嗯，克莱蒙梭应该已经联系你说明过情况了，我先去找信浓，之后我们一同去存放碎片的地方。
欸，指挥官您指的是什么事？克莱蒙梭大人今日并未联系过我……
而且“存放碎片”的地方是指……？
违和感，强烈的违和感。
此种感觉，就如同当日身处博览会闭幕式现场之时。
匆匆告别斯特拉斯堡后，我急忙前往了信浓的住所。

sequence: 鸢尾教国·圣米歇尔山港

亦是美好一日？.say: ——信浓！
指挥官阁下？如此匆忙所为何事？
情况紧急，我就开门见山了。信浓，你还记得神石碎片的事么？
具体是指哪一片？
昨天晚上我们一起确认的，位于此处圣堂之中的存放的神石碎片。
此处为鸢尾圣堂……为何会有神石碎片的存在？
而且汝说昨夜……据妾身所知，昨夜宴会之后，汝就直接返回休息之处了，并未来过妾身这里。
……何来“一同确认”？
（信浓竟然不记得昨夜的任何事了……怎么会这样，难道这次连她也受到影响了么……）
……昨夜，你说因为你的护符也是神石碎片雕刻而成的，所以你对于神石碎片有熟悉的感觉，因此才会发现隐藏在此处的碎片。
唔……妾身确实之前有过一个护符，不过并非由神石碎片所制，而且也早已遗失了。
汝的所言所行甚是奇怪。难道是昨夜做了一个逼真的梦，醒来之后混淆梦境与现实了么？
（不……绝对不可能，一定是演习会场之中出现了某种异常事态。）
（对了……克莱蒙梭并未前来会场，得向她确认一下昨夜的事。）
将疑问发送给克莱蒙梭后，很快收到了她的回复。
“重樱从来没有用神石碎片与维希教廷交换过任何东西，圣米歇尔山圣堂中也不存在任何神石碎片。”
“同时，指挥官昨夜并未与我联络过。”
连克莱蒙梭都不记得昨夜发生的事……？
难道……真的是我多心了。
与信浓和克莱蒙梭讨论神石碎片的事是一场逼真的梦，而与斯特拉斯堡共舞的晚宴才是现实……么？
一段时间后，圣米歇尔山车站——
心中的疑惑依然没能得到解答，但出发时间就要到了。
在即将登车之时，遇到了东煌的镇海小姐。
诸位下午好，已经打算出发了么？恐怕诸位
嗯，差不多要到发车时间了。听上去，镇海小姐不打算坐火车返回会场了么？
算是吧~而且不光是我，恐怕诸位接下来的日程也要做些调整了。
调整？
东煌在此向诸位发出正式邀请，邀请指挥官与其随行人员于今日前往BP司令部，协助东煌日后将要进行的作战行动。
不知诸位意下如何？
隶属于东煌管辖的碧蓝航线BP司令部……我还从来都没去过呢。
真是令人意外又突然的邀请。
是啊。我印象里，这还是东煌第一次对指挥部提出需要指挥官协助作战的申请吧？
你记得不错，正是如此。
我们与指挥官都对于东煌的这次邀请十分有兴趣。
只是……或许是因为这是东煌的第一次申请，对于流程不太熟悉。
指挥官调动到不同战区，是需要碧蓝航线指挥部下达的正式调动命令的。
很遗憾，正是如此。如果没有指挥部的调动命令，恕我们无法赴约。
呵呵，关于这次调动，指挥部已经通过了东煌的申请哦，命令或许正在草拟中尚未发出吧~
已经……通过了？
这种效率……怎么可能。
是啊！指挥部怎么会有这么高的效率？！
不信的话，诸位尽可以向指挥部核实一下哦~
指挥部的回复很快传来了，一同而来的还有一份正式前往BP司令部的调动命令。
这样手续上就没问题了呢~
东煌这是……施加了什么魔法么？
过去的每次战区调动都伴随着皇家、白鹰、北方联合间的长时间拉扯。
……这次怎么会通过得如此轻松？
呵呵，或许是因为“好运”吧。
指挥官难道没察觉到么，这种从今天起就萦绕在身边的氛围？
万事如意，心想事成~
（“从今天起就萦绕在身边的氛围”？！东煌……似乎对当前发生的异常事态有所察觉！）
（……试图带我们离开演习会场也是因为这一点？）
既然收到了指挥部的正式调动命令，我们就没有拒绝的理由。
孟菲斯，海伦娜，跟我一起去东煌吧。
嗯……没想到指挥部真的同意了。我们这算是……出差途中又出差？
算是回归本职工作才对~！
你也听到镇海小姐说的了——“协助作战行动”。
这才对嘛~作为舰船，老在后方耗着可是会生锈的！
呵呵~各位请随我来，我们坐车去机场——
诸位请等一下。
指挥官，信浓大人有事找您，可否请您移步？
信浓？
出发不着急的。指挥官，先去办您的事吧。
跟随能代来到了一个四下无人之处。
信浓坐在不远处的长椅上，手中紧握着一个翠绿色的护符。
指挥官，自从汝提到护符后，妾身就一直心神不宁。
随后……妾身经过翻找，居然真的找到了那枚记忆中“早已遗失”的护符。
护符一直都在妾身的身上……只是妾身没能意识到它的存在。
随后……妾身便想起来了——昨夜，汝确实来找过妾身。
说来也奇怪。就如同这护符一般，当妾身明确意识到这一点之后，昨晚的记忆也就顺势浮现而出了。
吾等与克莱蒙梭确实通过话，鸢尾圣堂之中，也确实存在着神石碎片。
可与此同时……昨夜，汝从未来过妾身住处，妾身与重樱诸位同伴一同举办赏月会的记忆依然鲜明。
随后妾身去找了能代。
起初她也如妾身一般，描绘着昨夜愉快的赏月会。
可是在妾身的提醒下，便也想起了昨夜之事的另一个版本，
秉实而言，同一时间、两种记忆，委实难辨。
然……此刻牢牢握于妾身之手的护符表明，与汝之深夜谈话为真。其余之象……再逼真，亦为假。
也就是说，你在看到护符之后……不但让自己想起了真正发生的事，而且……也帮能代想了起来？
然也。毫无疑问，会场之中正在发生某种难以察觉又扰人心神的异变，连妾身都没能幸免。
若不是汝提到护符之事，而妾身又恰巧找到了护符……恐怕。妾身到现在还蒙在鼓里。
……那枚护符，是用神石碎片雕刻而成的对吧？
不错，而且花纹亦是妾身从梦境之中见过的样式。
（这枚与梦境和神石均有关联的护符……难道还隐藏着更多秘密。）
你在来这里之前，让更多人清醒过来了么？
还没有。妾身有所发现之后就急忙来找汝了，还好汝并未出发。
很好。你暂时装作什么事都没意识到，依然处于影响之中的样子，也不要让更多人清醒过来。
从与克莱蒙梭的通讯中可知，演习会场之外也受到了这场异变的影响。
我们尚不清楚受影响的具体规模，和引发此次事件的推手。
敌暗我明，需要低调行事。
妾身明白。那接下来，如何做？
接下来，我要先前往东煌的BP司令部调查，东煌似乎对于当前的事态有所了解，并且在准备一个行动。
你留在欧罗巴，留意接下来的局势变化。
既是如此……拿上妾身的护符吧，这个护符，似乎拥有能够让人清醒的力量。
不。你要留好这枚护符，欧罗巴需要更多清醒的人。
给，拿上这个——这是克莱蒙梭送给我的胸针。
一会你正常坐火车返回鸢尾首都，然后去找克莱蒙梭。
如果有人阻拦你，亮出这枚胸针自可以畅行无阻。
见到克莱蒙梭之后，如果发现她还处于异常状态的影响中，就唤醒她。
再之后的一切行动全听她的安排。
妾身明白了。
那事不宜迟，我们就在此别过吧。一切小心。
一切小心。

sequence: 于是，观摩之旅来到了离别之时。
属于幻梦的间奏曲也迎来了尾声。
棋盘之外，自变量开始了行动。
棋盘之中，棋手亦开始了行动。
而那彼方之音，依然在星间回荡着——

A Musician's Dream.say: *sirens blaring*
Fire, smoke, destruction. The world is falling apart before my eyes.
Sirens let out piercing wails, metal screeches and cries, bombs whistle through the air.
The holy land of the Iris has been turned into a hellscape.
This can't be...
KABOOOM!
Strasbourg! I've finally found you!
*pant*... Are you okay? Please talk to us!
I'm... okay. I think.
I try to concentrate, but my mind is a mess, still struggling to think straight.
Even things I should know elude me – like who I am, where I am, and what I'm doing.
I'm... That's right, I'm Strasbourg, the battlecruiser.
Well, yes?
Is something wrong?
No, it's fine. Where are we? What's happening?
This is serious, L'Audacieux. I think she's hit her head.
Let's all try to stay calm! Take a deep breath, Strasbourg. Tell me what's the last thing you can remember.
The last thing...
I remember... setting up a joint exercise, and there was a banquet afterward...
There were flowers, exquisite food, and music...
Stras... That banquet was two days ago.
I see... It's clear that you're very disoriented.
This place is dangerous, and we'll be caught in the crossfire if we don't run! We can talk later!
We're... going to run away?
Yes, that's what she said. Come on, hurry!
KABOOOM!
A shell impacts nearby. The explosion sends pebbles flying just past my face, and my memories start to come back one by one.
The Orthodoxy, the Royal Navy, Iron Blood, the Sardegna Empire... The four major factions were hosting a joint exercise to deepen their bonds.
Then for some reason, we all started fighting each other...
I thought we'd put this petty infighting behind us...
We fled from Kébir, Toulon, and even Mont-Saint-Michel...
How long are we going to keep running?! How long must we keep fighting for?!
KABOOOM!
My powerless, resentful screaming is drowned out by thunderous cannon fire.
At the same time, the world starts to spin around me.
*gasp*! *pant*... *pant*...
Soft sunlight shines through the curtains.
I'm... in my own room...
I'm still alive... So that was just a bad dream...
A horribly vivid dream, but a dream all the same...
Strasbourg shakes her head vigorously to try and forget about it, but the memory doesn't want to go away.
I should have a talk with them...
Mont-Saint-Michel - Basilica
As a matter of fact... I had the same dream.
We were all fighting one another while the seas burned around us.
Dupleix and I were running around, trying to rescue people, and that's when we found you.
Maybe it was a stress-induced hallucination... Though the odds of such a coincidence are impossibly low.
Did you have the same dream?
I did. Exactly the same.
So all three of us dreamed the same thing... That has to mean something big.
This reminds me of something – the near-superimposition event.
Everyone present at the World Expo at the time reported having the same vision. So, if the same thing is happening here...
That means there are corrosion entities.
There is nothing to suggest corrosion is taking place. I personally verified that no traces of corrosion were present on the way here.
Taking that out of the picture, the only hint we're left with is that joint exercise. Do either of you know anything about that?
Not a thing, sorry.
Neither do I.
Then I think we're getting worked up over nothing.
What we witnessed happened during said exercise, so if there won't be an exercise, then there won't be a tragedy.
Maybe, but should we really disregard our dream as one big coincidence?
There's no way it's as simple as–
BEEP BEEP!
Huh? A message from Clemenceau?
What does it say?
"In two days, Cardinal Richelieu will host a joint exercise near Mont-Saint-Michel. Invitations have been sent out to the Royal Navy, Iron Blood, and the Sardegna Empire..."
"In addition to each respective faction's leader, the Commander will also be present. Kindly start preparing to host our guests."
There it is. The big four coming together for a joint exercise. It's happening.
Gather everyone and get started on the preparations. I'll inform Clemenceau about our dream.
Very well. Let's hope nothing bad happens...

A Formal Invitation.say: It's been two and a half days since I returned from the Martyrium and got a message from the Eagle Union's top brass.
On day one – that is, when I got the message – there was a follow-up report, stating that "the incident in the Pacific had wrapped up, and a follow-up investigation is being performed."
On day two, all factions received a message prompting them to "concentrate on gathering intel."
And now, I'm faced with all the information that Memphis and her crew have collected.
Hallucinations... Hallucinations... Nightmares... Spontaneous delirium...
A sudden manic episode... Hallucinations... Nightmares... Malfunctions in electronics...
Nightmares... Hallucinations... A shared nightmare... More nightmares...
These unexplained phenomena have also been observed among all factions around the Pacific, not just the Eagle Union.
Is this all the intel we have to work with?
As far as verifiable intel goes, yes.
There were tons of rumors, hearsay, and urban legends, but I filtered those out.
Those don't sound worth referencing for our purposes... but they could help me kill some time.
Do me a favor and send those, too. I'll skim them until we reach our destination.
Sure. Just a second.
Memphis fiddles with her device and hits send. A staggering amount of files pop up on my device.
Sheesh, you weren't kidding. It's a lot.
Yup. This is how much data you get when we all work together.
The train tracks produce a rhythmic "thunk-thunk" as we move along. This is the perfect environment for reading some fiction.
Outside the window, the idyllic pastures of summertime Europa continue on and on forever.
I start to reminisce on how fortunate I am to be aboard this train and not sitting in yet another meeting in the Orthodoxy's capital.
If not for the events of yesterday, maybe that's where I'd be now...
July 23rd - Office
Commander, we've received an invitation from the Orthodoxy.
What kind of invitation?
I think they're inviting you to take part in a joint exercise on their turf.
Here. Feel free to read it yourself.
Helena hands me a letter adorned with a wax seal.
"You are hereby invited to the Peace Interlude, a joint exercise between the Iris Orthodoxy, the Royal Navy, Iron Blood, and the Sardegna Empire."
"A train will be sent out for you. Please board it on July 24th."
Since this came completely out of nowhere, I decided to look into it.
Apparently, Richelieu and Elizabeth suddenly drafted this exercise while you were absent earlier.
(THEY did? Then maybe this is the cover story they came up for me while I was out whale-hunting.)
(Since I returned way sooner than they anticipated, I suppose that means now I HAVE to attend this exercise.)
Well, it's an invitation from our allies. I see no reason to refuse.
I've been craving a break from all these meetings, anyway. Spending some time with the girls will do me good.
Commander's Private Train Car - The Present
You haven't happened to uncover any secret intel about this bizarre incident, have you?
Secret intel? You have a funny way of phrasing things sometimes. What do you want to know?
Anything. Knowledge is power, and I'll take anything you have, be it directly related to the incident or any details about what happened in the Pacific.
Sadly, I know no more than you about the incident.
My sources, too, have very little to share. You're better off probing Sara if you want some intel on that.
As for the event in the Pacific... I don't really have anything on that, either.
Oh, wait, I do know one thing. This happened around when Elizabeth dragged you off to... wherever she did.
Anyway, the Sakura Empire had a sudden change of attitude.
"Change of attitude"? In regards to what?
The Azur Lane's reform. Their leaders must've finally worked something out, because now they're in favor of the idea.
I've also heard they sent out lavish gifts to many factions...
So the Sakura Empire has adopted a more positive attitude. That's great.
(Although, I don't like how sudden this 180 was. I'll have to ask Shinano about it later.)
*knock knock*
Who is it?
Guichen, your humble witch. Cardinal Richelieu has invited you to join her for lunch.
She said she understands if you're otherwise busy, though.
I'd be happy to, there's just one thing...
Don't worry, we'll have meals delivered to your companions as well.
That's so kind of you. Personally, I'll stay here and enjoy the view. You go enjoy your lunch, Commander.
The rest of us will be fine! Have a nice time.
(Hmm. This exercise isn't just for a change of pace. She must have some ulterior motive.)
(Regardless, I'll hear what she has to say.)

A Casual Meal.say: A gust of appetizing aromas greets me as soon as I open the train car door.
Smells like Sardegnian food is on the menu today.
Thank you for joining me, Commander. Please, have a seat.
Stepping inside, I find Richelieu and Elizabeth sitting opposite each other. Next to Elizabeth, there's Veneto, and next to Richelieu is an empty chair.
(I'm assuming that one's meant for me.)
It's been a long time since we last met on a pleasant occasion such as this.
I'm glad to be leaving those conference rooms and meeting venues behind, for a change.
Also, all the food you see here was prepared by me, using only the finest of our local ingredients. I hope it'll be to your taste.
(Why does it feel less like Richelieu wanted to speak to me and more like she wanted me to speak with Veneto?)
Yes, your cuisine is renowned throughout all of Europa, and clearly for good reason.
Servant, help yourself. Don't be shy now.
Nom... I should instruct my maids to take notes on this. Some variety would be much welcome in my diet.
(Sounds like Elizabeth came here solely to eat, meanwhile... Speaking of which, I'm hungry. Let's dig in.)
I join the girls at the table, savoring the food and engaging in some chitchat.
Really, Sardegna owes you so much, Commander. You prevented a disaster at the World Expo, and you helped us get our foot in the door at the conference.
This lunch alone will by no means repay you for everything, but I hope it can serve as a gesture of our goodwill.
To let us pay our debt in full, will you consider paying a formal visit to Sardegna?

options.content: Thank you. I'll definitely visit when I can.
I'll have to think about it.

A Casual Meal.say: We will do everything in our capacity to ensure you have an unforgettable Roman holiday.
Oi! You're not going to Sardegna without me and an entourage of Royal Maids!
I've almost exclusively eaten Orthodoxy cuisine lately and I've forgotten how delicious Sardegna's is. Take me with you!
We'd be honored to have you as a guest, Your Majesty. I assure you you'll be given our best hospitality.
Excellent!
(She really has nothing but food on her mind...)
(It's odd how quiet Richelieu has been this whole time. She's the one who invited me, so doesn't she have anything to say?)
(Now's a good time to segue into the topic we've all been dancing around.)
So, what are your thoughts on this joint exercise, ladies? Tell you the truth, I've got a question about it.
And what might that be?
Well, I know you had to come up with something on account of me returning sooner than you expected...
But did it have to be so large-scale? A four-faction joint exercise is a pretty big deal.
We're doing this because I want to. What more reason do you need?
None, if we're talking from an outsider's perspective. Personally, though, I want to know why.
Hmm?
I understand your curiosity. There is indeed another reason for it.
I imagine you've already heard about the Sakura Empire's recent activity. This seemed like a good time for all of Europa to spring into action, and so, we came up with this exercise.
Admittedly, we pushed it out the door with little fanfare or buildup...
Regardless, we hope it will show the world how solidarity between shipgirls looks when the four of us work together.
In addition, many things will be easier in the future if we're able to prove that Europa can come together as one.
(Sounds like an offensive-defensive alliance. It would give us a lot of leeway both during advances and retreats.)
(If the Azur Lane is reformed, it would significantly amplify the influence held by the factions of Europa.)
(Furthermore, if the reform fails, they have a backup plan in the shape of a Europan alliance. They don't strictly need the banner of the Azur Lane to move forward.)
And that's why you came up with the Peace Interlude. I get it now. It holds a lot of symbolic meaning.
On a related note, where's Bismarck? Is she not here?
She'll catch up with us at the exercise area.
I believe she thought the directness of that route would be more convenient.
(And yet, she was nowhere to be seen at the conference, observing from afar the whole time.)
(Interesting how she'll be present in person this time.)
(This Europan alliance might just work out...)
(Imagine that. A brand new player on the world stage.)
And so, our laid-back luncheon aboard the train continues.

Peace Interlude.say: Clear skies, calm waters. The faction flags of Europa flutter in the wind above Mont-Saint-Michel.
Shipgirls and mass-produced ships have both gotten into position and await orders. The Peace Interlude is about to begin.
Ugh... It took some ruthless all-nighters, but we got done in the nick of time...
At least we didn't run into any real trouble along the way.
You deserve a medal, Dupleix.
We can't celebrate yet, though. This is where things really kick off.
I know, I know. I just needed a little break before continuing.
Whew... Now it's time to focus on the exercise itself.
It seems this will be a round-robin competition with each of the factions taking turns between attacking and defending. Interestingly, there is no ranking system in place.
Though, I suppose there's no reason to have one. This is, after all, just an exhibition tournament meant to deepen bonds.
You'd think shooting at each other rather than a designated target would have the opposite effect, though...
You're looking at it the wrong way.
Fighting fellow shipgirls lets you figure out your own strengths and weaknesses, no?
You have a point. Anyway, we should start setting off.
Our fleet is up first, AND Cardinal Richelieu is watching. We must give it our all.
What's the matter?
Oh, nothing. I was just lost in thought.
L'Audacieux's right. Psych yourselves up and let's show them the Orthodoxy's glory.
Good day to you, ladies.
Good day to you as well. Welcome to Mont-Saint-Michel.
I've heard so much about this grand Basilica. Seeing it with my own two eyes now, I can say it's every bit as splendid as they say!
It is quite the sight. I'm glad to hear you're so fond of it.
Ahem. Hermione, that's enough small talk.
Oh, right! Do forgive me.
Then without further ado, let's begin, ladies.
Of course. Good luck.
Congratulations. We admit defeat.
You fought admirably. It's no wonder they speak so highly of you Royal Maids.
We've gained a better understanding of our strengths and weaknesses thanks to you. I look forward to fighting you again with our roles reversed.
Likewise. It will be an honour to face you again.
The Royal Navy fleet regrouped, then withdrew from the exercise area.
Whew... Great work, girls.
Catch your breaths, then we'll go and meet Iron Blood.
I'm afraid this is as far as you'll get.
That's a lot of retrofits you've got. I didn't see any of that on the invitee list.
Perhaps not the retrofit part, but we are on the list. It's not like it's against the rules.
I've heard the Royal Navy is deploying retrofitted girls in batches. It seems you had the same idea.
Yes, though we've never fought together as a fleet before, so this will be a first for us.
Still, we won't hold anything back, and I hope you won't either!
Well said! Let's go!
All our forces have either been neutralized or suffered heavy damage... That was a very close match.
What's more... it looks like they earned slightly more points than us.
It really is remarkable what a force multiplier a retrofit is. Especially when you concentrate them into a single team.
I-I mean, you were all really strong, too...
Now we should all catch our breaths for a bit. It'll be exciting to see how you fare in the rematch.
Same. We'll get you next time for sure.
The Iron Blood fleet regrouped, then pulled out of the exercise area.
Up next – Sardegna. They'll be our last opponent on the defensive.
I know there's nothing on the line, but I would like at least two victories today.
Remember that this is an exhibition tournament. Winning or losing isn't what matters.
You don't want to shoot your bolt too soon, or the next three battles as the defenders will be a struggle.
She's right. Recharge your batteries, then we'll face off against Sardegna.
*snap*!
A picture's worth a thousand words! I call this, "The Orthodoxy's Fleet Sails Against the Wind."
Whoa! Look how cool they look! You might win a Pulitzer for this one!
I reckon so, too!
You're... a journalist?
Not JUST a journalist – I'm also one of your opponents! Name's Alfredo Oriani. This is Captain Pompey, and that's Giuseppe Garibaldi.
Greetings.
Prepare yourself, challengers! The great Captain Pompey shall take you on!
Draw your swords and show me your shimmering blades!
Excuse me?
Come on, surely you know what I mean? Don't your Cardinal and Fighting Angels make their weapons glow when they attack?
You mean... like this?
Yes, just like that!
*snap*!
Beautiful. "The Templar Knight Unveils Her Radiant Sword." Another one for the collection!
Could you take this at least a LITTLE seriously?
Also, aren't YOU the challengers here? You're in Orthodoxy waters, so...
Well said! But enough words! It's time to do battle!
Were you even trying?
I've been vanquished! How could this be?!
Man, that was a really close one! Talk about unstoppable force meeting immovable object!
I mean, the scoreboard says we beat you by a landslide.
Hey, it's not about winning or losing! It's about the friends we made along the way!
Alright, Alfredo. You lost your first battle, so it's back to school with you.
No, wait! I lost on purpose, okay? I'll get serious in the next battle, promise!
I've even got a foolproof secret plan!
Secret plan? You've piqued my curiosity.
Oh, you're gonna love it! Just be patient and you'll see!
Uh-huh. I'm looking forward to it.
As you should. See you later!
The Sardegnian fleet regrouped, then left the exercise area behind.
And so, the Iris Orthodoxy's turn as the attacking side concluded. Now it was time to play defense.

Face to Face.say: From the Basilica, I watch the exercise unfold through multiple drones in the air.
The footage is sent to my device, processed by my tactical analysis system, and relayed to me in real time.
The Orthodoxy and Iron Blood are fighting at the moment, and they are neck and neck.
That's the power of retrofits for you. Retrofit a cruiser and put it up against a battlecruiser from the same era and the former will give the latter a run for her money.
I hope the Eagle Union put together a retrofit-focused fleet of their own.
(In that regard, retrofits and Type II's aren't THAT dissimilar.)
(Well, strictly in terms of increasing combat potential. Retrofitting and developing augment modules are significantly less resource-intensive than creating a Type II...)
(Hmm? Is that... Strasbourg?)
(I've heard about her – in equal parts about her combat ability and her musical talent.)
(She looks pretty nervous. It's like she's not focusing entirely on the battle.)
(Maybe she's got performance anxiety from knowing Richelieu is spectating.)
*knock knock*
Who is it?
I have a message from Bismarck. She says she'd like you to come and watch the exercise with her.
(Ah. I've been waiting for that invitation, though I expected it to come in a more roundabout way.)
Sure thing. Lead the way.
Basilica - Bismarck's Quarters

options.content: Thanks. You get comfortable too, alright?

Face to Face.say: Hello, Commander. Make yourself at home.
Yes, it has. We haven't spoken since the battle in the Antarctic.
Of course. This is an informal meeting and I'm happy to let go of the formalities.
I see you're not in your Zwei rigging. Is something wrong with Geryon?
Oh. No, Geryon is fine, and my Zwei rigging works as normal.
I'm only in this form to express my desire for peace. Personal image, too, matters in politics.
Let's not forget that we're on Orthodoxy land as well.
Dressed for peace, but geared up to win the tournament. I think that sends mixed signals.
You have the wrong idea.
This event is meant to deepen interfactional bonds. Not showing my hand to some degree invites unwelcome speculation. You must think the same, no?
Yeah, you are showing your hand – but not JUST in the name of deepening bonds, am I right?
If it was only about bonds, I wouldn't be here in person. I'm keeping my options open for an alliance.
A Europan offensive-defensive alliance, perhaps?
Sharp as ever.
Our war with the Sirens – or at least, our war with their experiment subdivision – is coming to a close. I must start planning for what comes next.
The reforming of the Azur Lane, in other words.
That's one thing, yes, but not the only one.
If simply coming together would've let the Azur Lane flourish, the Crimson Axis wouldn't have come into being.
Things have changed, though. Now we share a common enemy.
We did back then, too.
You're here, talking to me precisely because you don't believe a conference in the Orthodoxy will be enough to reform the Azur Lane, are you not?
Correct. We don't just need the members of Azur Lane, we need ALL factions to come together and face the future – to fight on a truly united front.
Does this alliance NEED to be called "Azur Lane"?
"Azur Lane" is more than just a name. It is an idea and a legacy.
Whatever form the alliance takes, I insist on this name.
I understand where you're coming from. Thanks for being honest with me.
Pardon? I thought you were testing me here.
Not at all. I simply wanted to watch the exercise and have a chat with you.
Though, one thing sticks out to me – you didn't object when I said that our war with the Sirens has all but come to an end.
I don't necessarily disagree. Don't get me wrong, they are still powerful foes and there's much we don't know about them.
On the other hand, we've eliminated Compiler and even figured out where Observer – their leader – keeps her mainframe.
Exactly. We're perfectly capable of destroying it even in an all-out frontal assault if we can all just band together.
Once their general's out of the picture, the rest of the elites will be easy pickings without anyone to command them.
That is true. So, how are you going to do it?
What do you mean?
Will you wait for a chance then crush them once and for all? Or will you show them some mercy?
No way. Letting them run wild is out of the question.
I knew you'd say that. Yes, THAT'S off the table.
Your tone suggests you had something else in mind.
There's eliminating them once and for all, and then there's using them to our advantage. But there's a third option – allying with them.
You and I both know that's ridiculous.
Ridiculous, but possible. You know where I'm coming from.
The Sirens – or should I say, Antiochus – were created for the purpose of fighting the enemy known as the X.
If we can recruit them to our side, our fighting odds against the X will improve noticeably.
You've not told me much about the X, but they must be quite a powerful threat, no?
I'll consider your idea, at the very least.
(Following my encounter with the mimic entities in the Martyrium, Helena META suggested a temporary intel ban for those who witnessed the entities.)
(In light of the threat the X poses and its potential for conceptual corrosion, all parties agreed to it.)
(However, this means I can only share the absolute minimum of intel about the X with everyone, which I'm definitely not happy about.)
I want to stress that the X really is just that dangerous. The more you describe it, the likelier it gets that it will appear.
One day, though – I promise to tell you everything one day.
Don't worry about it. Richelieu and Elizabeth have told me plenty about how dangerous intel about them is.
Continue your investigation at your own pace. I assure you that Iron Blood will not proactively pursue this matter.
BEEP BEEP!
A message from Memphis? Surely she's not worrying that I've done anything to you.
No, it's just about work. I should probably get going, though.
Before I do, one more thing...
I have something to tell you in an official capacity as the Commander of the Azur Lane.
The leaders of the Azur Lane want to issue a formal reminder to Iron Blood.
Go on.
They request that you remember the agreements you have struck in the past and that you perform your obligations.
Of course. Iron Blood will follow through on promises made and is working on liberating occupied Reenactment areas.
A surprisingly concise answer. I wasn't expecting that.
For the sake of the reform, we're willing to go above and beyond to demonstrate our sincerity and will to cooperate.
Besides, this is necessary for Iron Blood to finally, truly break free from the Sirens' shackles.
Not only that – it's also necessary for our world to face the future.
We will not back down, and we will not fold under pressure.
Thank you. Now I've got something to tell the powers that be.
Heehee. By all means, tell them.
Now that we've come to this point, it's clear that something big is going to happen in the world, and soon.
All the factions have already begun secretly preparing for what's to come, be it good or bad.
Oh, one more thing before you go – we came here with an envoy from the Kingdom of Tulipa.
Yes, Tulipa. The land that for the longest time hasn't had any shipgirls in its military.
There will be a party once this exercise has concluded. Why don't you come along and meet the representative?

Music in the Night.say: Slow music fills the hall, furnished with classical Orthodoxy ornamentation. Members of all factions are present at the party.
Hmph... As much as I hate to admit it, this food is pretty good.
You lot have prepared quite the party, considering how little time you had.
Yes. You really get the feeling that they pulled all the stops out.
Thank you. I'm humbled. With so many factions in attendance, I wouldn't dare give my guests anything less than the best.
Who's that playing the music? Strasbourg?
Indeed. I actually wanted her to relax at the party, since she worked so hard setting up the exercise...
However, she insisted that playing music is her way of relaxing, and wouldn't back down.
I see.
Strasbourg's music flows through the banquet hall like the water of a crystal-clear river.
The weariness I saw in her expression earlier today is nowhere to be seen now.
I can tell she's been working really hard. Her efforts have really brought this banquet to the next level.
Heehee. I'm sure she'd be overjoyed to hear you say that.
I know you're a busy person, but for now, try to forget all your troubles and enjoy yourself, okay?
Commander's Private Room - Nighttime
*knock knock*
Cardinal Richelieu told me to come, so... Do you have a minute, Commander?
Strasbourg? Did something happen to her?
No. It's about me.
I, and everyone else at Mont-Saint-Michel had the exact same nightmare just a while ago.
I've been told you know a lot about dreams. Then there's the fact that people all across the Pacific have been experiencing phenomena involving nightmares...
I've heard about that. How long ago was the nightmare?
Just two days ago.
(Two days... Today's the 25th, so then it happened on the 23rd.)
(And the report concerning the Pacific came in on the 22nd...)
(Similar phenomena were reported across Europa in the days leading up to the World Expo... but this time, it's being reported in the Pacific. How's it reaching all the way over here?)
Anyway, come in. We'll talk inside.
Sometime later...
And that's the long and short of it.
(They ALL had the same nightmare about a disaster happening in this exercise...)
(Yeah. There's no way this is a coincidence.)
Thanks for telling me about this.
I saw you were a bit out of it during the exercise. You were thinking about this, weren't you?
Ah... So you noticed. Nothing escapes you, I suppose.
You're a real fighter, you know. Working this hard with something so heavy weighing on your mind.
Ahem... Well, thank you for the compliment.
You must be exhausted. I say call it for today and get some sleep. I'll investigate this, meanwhile.
And if you have another nightmare, come see me and I'll make you feel better.
Thanks for being so considerate. I wish you sweet dreams.
(When it comes to dreams, nobody knows better than Shinano.)
(I heard she's here at Mont-Saint-Michel. I'll go talk to her.)

The Secret of the Basilica.say: I find Shinano as I enter the waiting room. She's getting ready to leave.
This one was just about to go searching for you... Coincidences are curious things...
Have you something to discuss?
Yeah, but you go first. What were you going to tell me?
Very well... Ever since arriving here, this one has felt a strange sense of familiarity.
It would seem that this Basilica holds a fragment of the Watatsumi.
What? A fragment of a Sakuran relic? On Orthodoxy land?
Indeed... I am likely able to sense its presence thanks to this ornament, for it, too, is made of a Watatsumi fragment...
However, its precise location eludes this one...
As she says that, she produces an emerald magatama – a jewel shaped like a comma – with a cherry blossom design carved distinctly on the front.
I see... Then there's a quick way to see if it's true or not.
Let's give Clemenceau a call. She should still be up.
BEEP BEEP!
Ah, if it isn't Shinano and the Commander. Is there a problem?
Not a problem, strictly speaking. I just wanted to ask you something.
Is there a fragment of the Watatsumi inside the Basilica at Mont-Saint-Michel?
Ooh. Bravo, Commander. You caught on to the Basilica's biggest secret right on day one.
How did you know?
So there IS one here... I don't deserve credit for figuring it out. Shinano did – she says she sensed it.
"Sensed it"... Now that's interesting.
I'll be frank – apparently, we were once in talks with the Sakurans about sharing technology with one another.
They handed us that Watatsumi fragment as part of the proceedings.
Bismarck said something to that tune, too. Was Sardegna at the discussion table as well?
No, not really. Not to my knowledge.
It's possible they were, but it was before my time. But, as you know, the Tribunal wasn't always the king of intelligence.
Fair enough. Shinano, do YOU know anything?
This one... was never even aware the Watatsumi had been part of any transaction...
That's alright. Your long slumbers don't allow you to be everywhere.
(Maybe Veneto knows something.)
(Although, the Sardegnians have a tendency for working on their own... If Sardegna DID discuss sharing technologies, there's a good chance Veneto was never told about it.)
(She had no idea about Marco Polo's plot to superimpose the world, for example.)
(And Marco... She still hasn't awoken from her slumber.)
If it's that important, shall I get the Tribunal on the case?
No need to. I was just wondering.
Anyway, I've said all I wanted to. Sorry for calling you so late. Go get some sleep now.
Heehee. You too.
Wait... Clemenceau, may this one see the fragment tomorrow?
That can be arranged. I'll work something out with Strasbourg.
Much obliged...
BEEP BEEP!
Thank you, for doing me this kindness... Now, what did you have to discuss?
Well, it's about dreams...
Nightmares... Again...
This one, too, beheld a nightmare yesternight.
In it, the future I had witnessed was engulfed in flames, falling apart... 'tis an ill omen that a tremendous event is coming.
A tremendous event... Then we've got to be ready for it.
Can you show me your dream directly?
No... This one hasn't dreamt ever since that vision...
Worse yet, it seems I have lost my ability to weave dreams...
As it stands currently, I am afraid I can be of little use to you...
However, I can ask Musashi... Perchance she can help you. Shall I?
Yes, please.
(When Shinano saw that dream, did she...? No, she wouldn't know either.)
(She says it's a bad omen, and with all these nightmares across the Pacific, I really do think a disaster is around the corner.)
(And Helena META is busy trying to stabilize Rodney. I can't rely on anyone else this time.)
(Now the question is... what do I do?)

The Dream of HER.say: A purple sky hung overhead while corrosion entities covered the land in white as far as the eye could see. This was a dream – a dream of the World Expo.
Strasbourg, the Cardinal's fleet is manipulating conceptual anchors and securing a path to the holy capital.
Also, Lady Clemenceau has told us to cleanse Mont-Saint-Michel and activate the conceptual anchors.
Well, ladies, this day has finally come.
At long last!
And the timing couldn't be any better.
We'll tear down the old world and forge a new path for ourselves.
Yes. A new path for a unified Orthodoxy.
Vichyan fleets across the country are contacting the Cardinal one by one. Should we follow suit?
No. We won't.
Lady Clemenceau's orders are only to cleanse the Basilica and activate the anchors.
Which is what we'll do now.
KABOOOM!
Just like then, Strasbourg carved a way forward, cutting down strange foes along the way. Though calm on the surface, her heart was in discord.
I don't understand... The closer I get to the Basilica, the stronger my feelings get...
Joy, anger, happiness, regret... Why am I feeling these things?
We did as ordered and split up, then regrouped, restarted, and returned to where we should be...
No... That's it, isn't it? I wasn't strong enough...
If only I were stronger, I could've fought back against these Reenactments and averted that blight upon our motherland...
If only this day had come sooner...
If only things were different, I'd be free of this regret and hopelessness...
All of a sudden, the corrosion-covered Basilica began to glow like the sun, as though it heard her plight.
The holy light purged the corrosion, restoring the night sky to its calm dark blue color.
It's... gone! Did the guardian saints of the Holy Iris hear my wish?
It's still not enough, though... More must be done to lift the eternal night over the Orthodoxy!
I must reach it... I must go faster!
She raised her engine speed and disappeared into the light.
The curtains rose on a dream of Kébir – where light and dark intersected.
I do hope that you understand the reason we are here today.
The Royal Navy would like your cooperation in halting the advances of Iron Blood.
I shall give you four options.
First: Leave with us right now, and enlist in the Royal Navy in our fight against Iron Blood and the Crimson Axis.
Second: Completely disarm. In return, the Royal Navy shall offer safe harbor for all of you.
Third: Allow us to escort you to the Eagle Union, where they shall disarm you.
Or, the final option we would rather not see: Sink right here and now.
...Is this your ultimatum? And what if all your options are unacceptable to us?
Then I hope you won't take it personally when we simply follow the orders we were given... and disarm you forcefully.
I hope that you can reconsider and join our fight, and that you'll make the right choice.
What nonsense. Dunkerque, we must NOT yield to them.
Agreed. We will fight to the end, no matter how poor our odds are.
Yeah. To the bitter end.
You seem to be in trouble, ladies.
Who are you?
I never wanted you to get dragged into this, ▇▇▇▇▇. I'm sorry.
You aren't a knight and have no obligation to fight by our side. You should evacuate by land, quickly.
(What? Who's "▇▇▇▇▇"?)
No. I will not turn my back on you, knowing you're faced with such a dilemma.
There is another way. The perfect option to get you out of this difficult situation.
Really? Please, ▇▇▇▇▇, tell me what it is!
Drive them back with a show of force. Don't forget that I've not come alone this time.
With booming rumbles, one massive ship after the next appeared out of the dock, cutting a wedge between the Royal Navy and Vichya Dominion forces.
(What are these pitch-black ships? Have they been here all along?)
I brought them here as part of our agreement to share technology. Surely you remember that, Strasbourg?
Oh... Right. Yeah, that happened.
Yes. We all know that happened.
Dunkerque, what do you believe our odds of victory are against their H Fleet if we combine our forces?
I think we'll stand a fighting chance.
And you, Hood? What are your thoughts on this?
You've made a grave mistake today, ▇▇▇▇▇ of the Sakura Empire. We will not forget this.
Ladies, let us retreat.
Have a safe voyage home. Heehee.
I don't understand... My head... I'm so confused...
Is something the matter? You've been acting quite disoriented.
The Royal Navy is gone. What more do you have to worry about?
Nothing, really, it's just...
"Just" what? Oh, I understand. Heehee. You had a nightmare last night, didn't you?
Nightmare...?
The Templar Knights are loyal to our Cardinal and to our faith. We will not take orders from anyone else.
And that includes the Iron Blood as well as the Empire. We shall never allow ourselves to become the instruments of their aggression.
It is clear to me how cynical your "alliance" is.
Our official response is this: "The Royal Navy is not trustworthy. We will fight until our last breath."
They already made their intentions clear to us with what they did to Dunkerque and the others.
While I draw breath, I will never allow us to bow before such hypocrites!
The Vichya Dominion is about to draw its last breath...
We are surrounded by vultures ready to devour us. But what of it?
The proud Templar Knights shall never bow their heads! So that we may never become puppets, I hereby order all of you to sink!
Now I remember... That nightmare...
It lasted for so, so long...
Fortunately, you're awake now.
All nightmares, even the most haunting ones, go away when you wake up.
You're right. I'm awake now, and everything is fine...
Precisely. Now, shall we go? I'm quite excited to hear your performance at the banquet later tonight.
Of course. The last thing I'll do is disappoint the Commander.

sequence: Local Train - Commander's Private Train Car

A Fine Day.say: The periodic clanking of the train's wheels slows down bit by bit. Finally, the whistle rings, signaling our arrival at the station.
Commander. Wake up. We've arrived.
I open my eyes... but everything is still pitch black.
(Am I wearing a sleep mask?)
I remove the blindfold with my hand. Looking out the window, I see a magnificent Basilica come into view.
I put it on you.
You talked big about how you were gonna get so much work done on the train, then you closed your eyes and dozed off instantly.

options.content: Thanks. I slept like a log.
But what about my work backlog?!

A Fine Day.say: I figured you needed your beauty sleep, so I covered your eyes for you.
You're welcome. A secretary has to know when to do these things.
Knowing you slept well is the best I could ask for.
Now, get your things in order. We've got an exercise to be at!
You really are a workaholic through and through, talking about work the moment you wake up...
Yes, Memphis, we've heard this before...
Whatever! I already did your work anyway, so just forget about it!
Now, get ready to disembark. We've got an exercise to be at!

sequence: Local Train - Commander's Private Train Car

A Fine Day.say: From the Basilica, I watch the exercise unfold through multiple drones in the air.
The footage is sent to my device, processed by my tactical analysis system, and relayed to me in real time.
The Orthodoxy and Iron Blood are fighting at the moment, and they are neck and neck.
That's the power of retrofits for you. Retrofit a cruiser and put it up against a battlecruiser from the same era and the former will give the latter a run for her money.
I hope the Eagle Union put together a retrofit-focused fleet of their own.
*knock knock*
Who is it?
I have a message from Bismarck. She says she'd like you to come and watch the exercise with her.
Basilica - Bismarck's Quarters
Hello, Commander. Make yourself at home.
Of course. This is an informal meeting and I'm happy to let go of the formalities.
Oh. No, Geryon is fine, and my Zwei rigging works as normal.
I'm only in this form to express my desire for peace. Personal image, too, matters in politics.
Let's not forget that we're on Orthodoxy land as well.
You have the wrong idea.
This event is meant to deepen interfactional bonds. Not showing my hand to some degree invites unwelcome speculation. You must think the same, no?
If it was only about bonds, I wouldn't be here in person. I'm keeping my options open for an alliance.
Sharp as ever.
Our war with the Sirens – or at least, our war with their experiment subdivision – is coming to a close. I must start planning for what comes next.
That's one thing, yes, but not the only one.
If simply coming together would've let the Azur Lane flourish, the Crimson Axis wouldn't have come into being.
We did back then, too.
You're here, talking to me precisely because you don't believe a conference in the Orthodoxy will be enough to reform the Azur Lane, are you not?
Heehee. You don't need to answer. I know what you're thinking.
Iron Blood will grant your wish. Whatever it takes.

sequence: Local Train - Commander's Private Train Car

A Fine Day.say: Slow music fills the hall, furnished with classical Orthodoxy ornamentation. Members of all factions are present at the party.
Hmph... As much as I hate to admit it, this food is pretty good.
You lot have prepared quite the party, considering how little time you had.
Yes. You really get the feeling that they pulled all the stops out.
Thank you. I'm humbled. With so many factions in attendance, I wouldn't dare give my guests anything less than the best.
The music stops. Then, out of nowhere, Strasbourg comes up to me.
Heehee. Welcome to Mont-Saint-Michel, Commander.
Richelieu told me you had many good things to say about me.
Hey, if you're free... may I have a dance?
This has been a wonderful today.
I hope tomorrow will be just as good.

Another Fine Day.say: Sheesh... I really slept in.
It must be noon already, judging by the intensity of the light coming through the window.
You really did. It's lunchtime.
It's not every day you oversleep like this. I'm glad we went on this business trip.
*yaaawn*... Yeah, true. I've not slept that well in ages.
Hey, did Strasbourg stop by in the morning?
Strasbourg? No, she's not been here.
(Maybe she slept in just like me.)
Lunch is ready, by the way.
Our train is departing in the afternoon. You can tour the place if you want to in the meantime.
(Right, there's the Watatsumi thing to look into. Better call Shinano.)
I finish my lunch and head outside. On the way to the Basilica, I run into Strasbourg.
Oh. Good morning.
Morning to you, too. Did you sleep well?
I sure did. Dancing with you really cleared my mind and let me sleep soundly.
Wait, dance? With me?
Weren't you busy playing music the whole night?
Pardon? Sounds like you're still half-asleep.
If you forgot, you and I danced the night away after I put my instrument down.
(Did we? Huh...)
Come to think of it, I DO vividly remember sharing a dance with her.
(But that can't be right...)
Anyway, where are you going? Are you going to admire the Basilica?
Yeah. I assume Clemenceau already told you. Let's go pick up Shinano, then we'll head to where the fragment is stored.
Hang on – told me about what? I haven't heard anything from her.
And what's this about a "fragment"? A fragment of what?
Suddenly, I get an overwhelming feeling that something is wrong.
This feels just like back during the near-superimposition event, when my memories were overwritten by... something.
I bid farewell to Strasbourg, then run off to Shinano's room in a hurry.
Shinano!
Ah... Why does your visage harbor such alarm?
Let me cut straight to the chase since we could be in danger. Do you remember the Watatsumi fragment?
Fragment? Which one do you refer to?
Last night, remember? You said there's a fragment of it here, in the Basilica.
What? Why would a fragment of it... be on Orthodoxy land?
As best as this one remembers, this one returned to this room after last night's banquet... We never spoke to each other...
This one has no memory of claiming there was a fragment here, as you now say...
(She doesn't remember? But the false memories didn't affect her the last time something like this happened...)
Okay, then what about that amulet you had? You said it's also made with a Watatsumi fragment. You should be able to use it and sense the other fragment's presence.
Yes... I did have a charm, once... However, it was made not of a Watatsumi fragment, and I lost it long ago...
You seem to be quite confused today... Perhaps you had a dream so vivid that you mistook it for reality?
(I hate to admit it, but she could be right. It'll take more than this to convince me, though.)
(I've got it. Clemenceau isn't here, so maybe she's unaffected.)
I bring out my device and send Clemenceau a message. I quickly get a reply.
"There is no record of any Watatsumi fragment being handed to us, so there's no evidence that the Basilica has one."
"There are also no logs of you and I having spoken yesterday."
(Not even SHE remembers... Did I really imagine all of it?)
(Shinano bringing up the fragment, Clemenceau telling us about it...)
(And Strasbourg never came to me to talk, instead we danced at the banquet...)
Sometime later, at the train platform...
My doubts and questions remain unresolved, but it's time to leave Mont-Saint-Michel behind.
Just as I'm about to set foot on the train, someone calls out to me.
Hello, Commander. Are you all heading back to the Orthodoxy mainland?
Yeah. Our train's leaving soon. Are you staying?
I suppose so. And not just me – I'm afraid you'll need to make some changes to your plans.
Why?
The Dragon Empery requests your presence at the BP military base to assist in an upcoming operation.
Is that okay with you all?
BP military base? I've never been there before.
Me neither.Well, THAT'S out of left field...
The Empery has never asked for assistance in an operation before. At least as far as I know.
Why, yes, this is the first time ever.
I'll admit, you've made me curious.
However, we have protocols to adhere to. I don't blame you if you were unaware, since this is your first time asking for something like this...
But regardless, taking the Commander to a new mission area requires going through the official channels and filing a request!
Yeah... Sorry, Chen Hai. We just can't change plans on the spot.
You needn't worry about that. We've already filed a transfer request with Naval HQ and should receive permission any minute now.
You're sure they'll process it THAT quickly?
No way. Naval HQ isn't that fast.
She's right. It can take an eternity for them to process a request like this.
If you don't believe me, you should report in and hear it straight from the horse's mouth.
Unbelievably, Naval HQ tells us on the spot that they've received permission to redeploy my unit.
That should be it then, right?
I'll be damned...
Usually, a metric ton of red tape stands in the way of any transfer request being granted.
How did you get approval so quickly?
I suppose you could say we got lucky.
Haven't you noticed it, Commander? There's a peculiar aura in the air today that wasn't here yesterday.
A wish, once made, makes itself come true, you could even say.
(A peculiar aura... that wasn't here yesterday? The Empery has to know that something's up!)
(So then this invitation is really just an excuse to get us out of here, isn't it?)
Well, seeing as you went through all this trouble, I can't possibly turn you down.
Helena, Memphis, let's visit the Empery.
Wow, I... I can't believe this is happening. Hang on, this means we're going on back-to-back business trips!
That suits me just fine!
She said we'll assist with an operation, remember?
We're shipgirls. We'll get rusty if we don't do some hands-on combat now and then!
I'm glad you're all on board, then. Let's take a car to the port and–
Hold on a minute.
Commander, Lady Shinano urgently requests your presence. Would you mind coming with me?
Wait, Shinano?
That's quite alright. We'll wait here for you.
Noshiro leads me out to a quiet, secluded place.
There, on a bench, sits Shinano, holding a green amulet in her hands.
After you told me of this amulet, the thought of it wouldn't leave my mind...
I searched my person, and lo and behold... I rediscovered it after all this time...
Though I've carried it with me for an untold time, I never knew it was there...
It was after that that the memories of your visit yesternight returned to this one...
Strangely, recognizing this amulet promptly reminded me of all the events that transpired.
Our conversation, Clemenceau's answer, the confirmation that a Watatsumi fragment hides within the Basilica...
And yet, I so clearly remember that which never happened – my brethren and I gazing at the moon together, whilst you never came to visit...
So, at a loss, this one confided in Noshiro.
At first, she only remembered the "original" version of events as I did...
As I told her more, she soon remembered the "alternative" version.
Telling apart the truth from the falsehoods was difficult for us both...
But by holding this amulet and talking to me, the truth revealed itself – the memories of you visiting me were the real ones.
So if I got that right... You found the amulet, regained your memories of last night, then got Noshiro to remember what happened, too?
Aye. There is no doubt that some strange spell has been cast upon the Basilica, and even this one was not immune...
Had you not spoken of the amulet and had I not found it, perchance I would've remained ignorant of the mind-trickery...
You said your amulet was carved from a piece of the Watatsumi, right?
Indeed. Its pattern comes from a dream this one had...
(So whatever's happening here, dreams and the Watatsumi are involved somehow.)
What about the others? Did you make anyone else wake up to the truth before coming here?
No... Meeting with you seemed a more pressing matter...
That might actually be for the better. I'd like you both to keep up the facade that everything's business as usual.
See, I messaged Clemenceau earlier and found out her memories had been affected, too.
For that reason, we should be very cautious until we know how far-reaching this phenomenon is and who could be behind it.
The mastermind is still hiding in the shadows, while we're out in broad daylight.
That is true. What plans have you for now?
I'm going to the BP military base, over in the Empery. They've figured out that something's wrong and are drafting a plan to deal with it.
While I'm there, I want you to remain in Europa and keep a close eye on things.
In that case, you should take this amulet... It may perchance be the key to awakening from this dream...
No, you hold on to it. There's one person I want you to wake up.
Take this. It's a brooch Clemenceau gave to me a while back.
Board a train to the holy capital and request to meet her face to face.
If anyone tries to stop you, show the brooch to them and they'll let you through.
Get into a meeting with Clemenceau and find a way to wake her up, assuming she hasn't already.
Once she's awake, she'll figure out what I'm going to do.
Very well...
Now, I've got to go. The train's about to leave. Good luck.
Likewise... Good luck.

sequence: And thus, the exercise came to an end.
As did the peaceful yet illusory interlude.
The spectators plan their next moves.
While the players on the board pick up their pieces.
The echoes from afar are still reverberating among the stars.

奏者の夢.say: 炎、爆煙、廃墟。私の目の前で世界が歪んでいる。
耳障りなサイレン、軋む鋼鉄の悲鳴、空からの爆弾が風を切る音。
アイリスの聖地は煉獄に包まれている。
ストラスブール……やっと見つけた！
ふぅ…大丈夫ですか？しっかりしてください…！
ええ……大丈夫よ。多分
精神を集中してみたものの、頭の中は相変わらずぼんやりとしている。
「私は誰？」「ここはどこ？」「今何をしている？」すら解せないぐらい。
……私は……巡洋戦艦ストラスブール……うん
そうだけど……？
どうしたの……？
なんでもない。ここはどこ？何が起きているの？
ローダシュー、まずいわ…ストラスブールが頭を打っちゃったみたい
お、落ち着いてくださいっ！ストラスブールさん、一度深呼吸してみてください。最後に覚えてることを教えてもらえますか？
最後に覚えてること……
合同演習を準備していて、それからパーティーがあって……
パーティー会場を飾る花、賓客をもてなす料理の数々、そして音楽……
パーティーって…もう二日前のことよ？
そうですね…とにかく状況は混沌としています
ここもじきに戦いに巻き込まれますから、逃げながら話しましょう…！
逃げる……？
ローダシューの言う通りよ。早く逃げましょう！
至近距離に砲弾が着弾した。爆風に吹き飛ばされた小石が顔を掠め、記憶が少しずつ鮮明になっていく。
アイリス、ロイヤル、鉄血、サディア、四大陣営の合同演習……勢力間の親睦を深めるためのイベントだったのに…
なぜか……みんな争い始めて……
せっかくその場から脱出したのに……くっ……
ケビール…トゥーロン……モンサンミッシェルからも逃げて…
一体いつまで逃げなきゃならないというの……いつまで戦わなきゃいけないというの…！？
無力で悔しい私の叫びが砲火の轟音に遮られた。
その瞬間、視界にある全てが回り始め――
…っ！！はあ……はあ……
ベールから柔らかい太陽の光が部屋に差し込んできた。
ここは……私の部屋……
まだ生きてる……今のは夢だったというの……
悪夢にしてはリアルすぎよ……全く……
悪夢を忘れようと懸命に頭を横に振ってみたものの、脳裏から光景がなかなか消えてくれない。
……みんなに相談してみようかしら
モンサンミッシェル・聖堂施設
……実は私も、同じような悪夢を見ました
各陣営が争い合う光景、燃え上がる海……
私はデュプレクスさんと一緒にみんなを助けようと駆け回って……ストラスブールさんを見つけて……
残業しすぎて幻覚でも見たのかしらね…こんな偶然って普通ありえないわ
デュプレクスも同じ夢を？
そう。二人と全く同じね
……三人揃って同じ悪夢を見た…ただごとじゃないわ
こういうので一つ思い出したわ。…「偽神事件」よ
サディアの世界博覧会の会場でもみんなが同じ幻覚を見たわ。それと同じ状況が起きてるなら――
「侵食性錯体」……
「侵食」が起きている証拠はありませんよ。ここに来る途中、どこにも「侵食」の痕跡がないことを確認しました
となると、残ったヒントは「合同演習」だけですね…ストラスブールさんたちは何か知っていますか？
ううん。全く何も
私も知らないわ
じゃあまだ杞憂かもしれませんね
悪夢の光景はここでの「合同演習」で起きたことですから、演習がなければそもそも起きようがありませんし
それはそうだけど……どんなに低い確率でも起きる時は起きちゃうし
でもさすがにそんな急には――
クレマンソー様からの連絡？
どんな内容ですか？
「……2日後、リシュリュー様がモンサンミッシェル周辺海域で合同演習を実施予定。ロイヤルと鉄血、サディア艦隊を招待済み……」
「それぞれの陣営の指導者だけでなく、指揮官も参加予定。来訪者受け入れの準備を」
ほら来た。四大陣営による合同演習、本当にあるんだ……
二人はみんなを集めて準備作業を。悪夢の件は私がクレマンソー様に連絡するわ
ええ。何も起きなければいいけれど……

sequence: アイリス・モンサンミッシェル

合同演習の招待.say: アルザスたちとマルティリウムから帰還後、ユニオン上層部から連絡が来て2日半が経った。
1日目、つまり連絡を受けた当日中に、「大洋での異常事態が収束しつつあり、現在事後調査を行っている」との続報が来た。
2日目、「情報収集に努めよ」との連絡が各陣営にそれぞれ届いた。
そして今、メンフィスたちがまとめた情報が自分の目の前にある。
――「幻覚……幻覚……悪夢……発作……」
――「突発的な躁状態……幻覚…悪夢……電子機器の故障……」
――「悪夢……幻覚……集団的な悪夢…悪夢…」
――ユニオンだけでなく、大洋周辺の各陣営で原因不明の異常現象が観測された、か
――情報はこれだけかな？
参考になりそうな情報はこんなところね。統計的なものにはなるけど
…あとは噂、流言、デマ、都市伝説と絡むものばっかりね
――参考価値は低そうだな。…まあ暇つぶしにはちょうどいいけど
――よかったらそれらも送ってきれくれないか？到着までまだ時間があるから、適当に読み流すよ
分かった。今送るわ
メンフィスは手に持っている端末を操作し始め――さっきよりもずっと多くの資料がこっちの端末に送られてきた。
――ずいぶんと多いな………
各陣営のみんなが協力してくれているおかげよ♪
ガタンゴトン、と列車が進む時に発するリズムのいい音は、こういった「フィクション」を読むのに最適だ。
エウロパの夏。車窓の外では牧歌的な風景がどこまでも続いていく。
そして、なぜ自分がアイリスの聖都の会議に出ているのではなく、こうして列車に乗っているかというと……
すべては昨日のある出来事からである――
7月23日。執務室
指揮官。……アイリスの仲間から招待状が届いているわ
――どんな招待なの？
ええと、アイリスでの合同演習への参加招待みたいね
これよ。よかったら確認して
ヘレナからアイリスの封蝋が施されている封筒を受け取った
――「アイリス、ロイヤル、鉄血、サディアによる合同演習、『平和間奏曲』を開催する……」
――「移動のための列車は手配してあり、――7月24日にご搭乗を……」
あまりにも急な話だったから、こっちも裏で調べておいたわ
この演習は先日指揮官が不在だった時、エリザベスとリシュリューが急遽決定したもので…
（エリザベスとリシュリューが？もしかしてこれは自分が「クジラ狩り」に参加するためのカバーストーリーか？）
（二人の想定よりも自分が戻ってくるのが早かったから、本当に演習視察に行かざるを得なくなった、というわけか）
――アイリスの仲間たちの招待だ。断る理由はない
――会議の件もちょうど一度メリハリ付けたいところだ。みんなで一緒に気分転換しに行こう
指揮官専用車両・今
――ふぅ。結局この異常事件で何か裏情報はつかめた？
裏情報…？急に変なことを聞くわね？どういうのを知りたいの？
――なんでもいいさ。異常事件だけでなく、最近大洋周辺で起きた事とか、自分がまだ知らなくて……知っておいたほうがいいことなら、なんでもさ
そうね…異常事件については何もないわ
こっちの情報源なんてたかが知れているし、それを聞くならサラトガちゃんに聞いたほうが早いんじゃない？
大洋周辺について……そっちもこれといったことはないわね
…そうだ。一つあったわ。確か指揮官が「エリザベス」に付き合わされた時のことだけど…
重桜が急に変わったみたいよ？
――急に変わった？それはどんな？
指導者格の艦船たちでようやく話がついたのか、再結成について急に前向きになったのよ
聞けば、色んな陣営に高級なプレゼントも贈ったとか…
――それはありがたい。重桜もようやく積極的に動いてくれるようになったのか
（急に変わった、というのはどうも引っかかるけどね。あとで信濃たちに聞いてみよう）
（トントン）
どちら様？
しがない魔女のギシャンよ。リシュリュー様から一緒に食事でもいかが、とのお誘いだわ
ご都合がよければ、とのことだけど……
――もちろん大丈夫さ。でも……
心配することはないわ～。ヘレナたちの分もあとで届けるから
あら、気が利くじゃない。こっちはここでのんびりと風景を眺めることにするから、指揮官は安心して行ってくるといいわ
う、うん！…ヘレナたちのことはいいから……
（ふむ……「合同演習」にはやっぱり何か別の狙いがあるな…？）
（まあ、ここは素直に話に乗ってみよう）

何もない昼食会.say: 扉を開けた瞬間、美味しい料理の香りが熱烈に迎え入れてくれた。
今日のランチメニューはサディア風のようだ――
来てくださってありがとうございます。指揮官。どうぞおかけになってください
何もない昼食会.actorName: リシュリュー

何もない昼食会.say: 中に入ると、リシュリューとエリザベスが対面で座っており、エリザベスの隣にはヴェネト、リシュリューの隣は――
（誰も座ってないな。多分この席だな）
最近、指揮官さまと会うのは大抵会議室かイベント会場ばっかりでしたけど
何もない昼食会.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

何もない昼食会.say: こうしてプライベートでの対面はずいぶん懐かしく思いますね
何もない昼食会.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

何もない昼食会.say: ここの料理は全て私の手作りで、食材も全てサディア本土から運んできたものです。気に入ってくれると嬉しいです
何もない昼食会.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

何もない昼食会.say: （ん？リシュリューが自分に会いたいというより、ヴェネトと会わせたかったのか…？
さすがエウロパで定評のあるサディア料理、結構美味しいわね
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: 下僕もほら、どんどん食べていきなさい
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: はむっ……今度メイド隊にはもっと色々学ばせたほうが良さそうね…たまには違う料理も食べてみたいわ
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: （エリザベスはどうやらご飯を食べに来ただけらしい……うん。深く考えないでおこう）
席に腰を下ろし、料理を楽しみながら仲間たちと雑談に興じた。
世界博覧会での「偽神事件」だけでなく、こうしてサディア協賛の陣営間の会議を無事に開催できたことも指揮官さまのおかげ…
何もない昼食会.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

何もない昼食会.say: 一度食事に招待する程度ではとてもご恩を返したとは言えません
何もない昼食会.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

何もない昼食会.say: つきましては指揮官さま、今度はサディアに一度正式にお越しいただけませんか？
何もない昼食会.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

options.content: うん、機会があったらお邪魔するよ

何もない昼食会.say: 精一杯おもてなしさせていただき、忘れがたき「ローマの休日」をご提供いたします
何もない昼食会.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

何もない昼食会.say: さ、サディアへの訪問ならわたしもメイド隊を連れて行くわよ！
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: この間はアイリス料理ばかりですっかりサディア料理の味を忘れちゃったわ！こっちも混ぜて！
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: 陛下も来てくださったら光栄に思いますよ。サディア代表として全力でおもてなししましょう
何もない昼食会.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

何もない昼食会.say: うんうん！そうしなさい！
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: （本当にごはんを食べに来ただけなんだ…）
（それにしてもリシュリューの様子がちょっと気になるな…招待するのは彼女だし、どうしてさっきから押し黙っているんだ…？）
（もういい頃合いだし、そろそろこっちから話を切り込んでみようか）
――ええとリシュリュー、それとみんなに聞きたいんだが、実はこの「合同演習」について分からないことがあって…
指揮官、それはどんな…？
何もない昼食会.actorName: リシュリュー

何もない昼食会.say: ――確かにこっちが早く戻ったせいで色々予定が変わったみたいだが…
――それにしても陣営4つも参加する大掛かりな合同演習をやるなんて、流石に急すぎないか…？
この私がやりたいからやるだけよ。それでも納得できないの？
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: ――いや、対外的にはそれで十分だが……どちらかというと自分のほうが理由を知りたいんだ
ふーん？
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: 指揮官が気になるのは理解できます。確かに、理由はほかにもあります
何もない昼食会.actorName: リシュリュー

何もない昼食会.say: 重桜の動きはもうお耳に入っていると思いますが…エウロパにいる陣営も動き出したほうがいいと思い、合同演習の開催に踏み切ったのです
何もない昼食会.actorName: リシュリュー

何もない昼食会.say: アイリス、ロイヤル、サディア、鉄血…
何もない昼食会.actorName: リシュリュー

何もない昼食会.say: 急なスケジュールにも関わらず、四大陣営が連携を見せれば、艦船たちの団結を世に知らしめることができます
何もない昼食会.actorName: リシュリュー

何もない昼食会.say: それに、エウロパが一丸になって行動を共にする既成事実が出来上がれば、今後色々動きやすくなることでしょう
何もない昼食会.actorName: リシュリュー

何もない昼食会.say: （進むも退くも一緒…いわば「攻守同盟」というやつか）
（「アズールレーン」の再結成が果たされれば、エウロパの陣営は大いに発言力を高められる）
（逆に再結成が躓いても、エウロパ同盟という枠組みがあれば脇道を確保できる……なんなら「アズールレーン」に拘らずとも前に進んでいける）
――なるほど。それで今回の「平和間奏曲」の開催というわけか。確かに象徴的な意味は大いにある
――そういえば、ビスマルクはここに来ていないのか？
ビスマルクなら演習海域で合流するわよ
何もない昼食会.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス

何もない昼食会.say: 航路的に直接合流するほうが便利だそうです
何もない昼食会.actorName: リシュリュー

何もない昼食会.say: （ビスマルクはアイリスでの会議には顔を出さず、ずっと遠隔で参加していたのに）
（合同演習には律儀に直接参加するんだな……）
（ふむ、エウロパ同盟、か……）
（みんな色々考えているようだ）
こうして、列車での昼食会は穏やかな雰囲気の中で進んでいった――

sequence: アイリス・モンサンミッシェル

平和間奏曲.say: 好天。快晴。モンサンミッシェルの山にエウロパ陣営たちの旗が風になびいている。
艦船たちと量産艦は既に所定位置にて待機しており――合同演習「平和間奏曲」が始まるまでもう間もなくだ。
くっ……残業で貫徹してやっと間に合った……
今まで特にトラブルも起きず順調に進んでいて……良かった……
苦労をかけたわね。デュプレクス
本番はまだこれからだけど……まだ気を抜いてはいけないわよ
分かってるわ。ちょっと一段落したから一息ついただけよ
んんん……いよいよ演習そのものに集中できるのね
四陣営の艦隊による攻守入れ替わりの総当たり戦…ではありますけど、別に何かを競ったりするわけではありませんね
あくまで親睦を深めるためのエキジビジョンですから、当然といえば当然ですけど
それでも、標的艦ではなく、仲間に銃砲をぶっ放すのは……
ローダシュー、見方を変えたほうがいいわ
艦船相手に戦うと、自身の強みと弱みが一番わかるでしょう？
そうですね……ではそろそろ出撃準備しましょう
アイリス艦隊が最初に登場しますから。リシュリュー様が見ていますし、しっかりしないと
ストラスブールさん？
…ごめん。ちょっとぼーっとしてたわ
ローダシューの言う通りよ。みんなしっかりして、アイリスの輝きを見せるわ
ごきげんうるわしゅうございます。アイリスの皆さま
あら、ごきげんよう、ロイヤルメイド隊。モンサンミッシェル海域へようこそ
モンサンミッシェルの聖堂施設のことはこちらでも度々伺っております。こうして直接見ると、噂通り本当に壮麗ですね…！
気に入ってくれたなら嬉しいわ
こほん。ハーマイオニー、挨拶はそれくらいで…
そ、そうですね！ごめんなさい、ダイドーちゃん
ではアイリス艦隊の皆さま、演習を始めましょう
ええ。よろしく
アイリスの皆様の勝ちみたいですね
いい戦いでした。さすがはロイヤルメイド隊の皆さんですね
おかげさまでこっちの長所と短所を見直すことができました。攻守を入れ替えたあとの再戦を楽しみにしています
はい。ロイヤル艦隊として謹んでお相手を務めさせていただきます
ロイヤル艦隊は陣形を立て直し、初戦の演習海域から離脱した。
ふぅ。…みんな、ご苦労さま
少し休憩して、鉄血艦隊のいる演習海域に向かいましょう
皆さん、ここまでいいですよ
近代化改修済みの艦船だらけね。演習の参加メンバーにはそんなこと書かれてなかったわ
別人でもありませんし、別にルールは違反していませんよ
ロイヤルは改造済みの艦船を集中運用していると聞きました。鉄血もそうですね
はい、ただこちらはまだ実戦投入は始めてですから、どこまで連携が取れるか未知数です
お互い全力で戦って、悔いのない演習にしましょう！
うん！私も同感です！
こっちの量産艦は全艦撃破、艦船は全艦損傷判定が出ている……なかなかの接戦だったわ
スコアは……あら、鉄血が少しこっちを上回ったのね
近代化改修済みの艦船だけあって、個々の戦力の上昇が顕著です。さらに集中運用することで――
そ、そっちも十分すごいよ……
ではそろそろ休憩に入りますね。このあとの再戦を楽しみにしています
ええ、しっかりリベンジさせてもらうわ
鉄血艦隊は陣形を立て直し、演習海域から離脱した。
次はサディア艦隊ね。攻める側での最終戦、ということかしら
順位をつけないとはいえ、せめて2勝は狙いたいわ
エキジビションマッチですから、勝ち負けは二の次なのをお忘れなく
ここで張り切りすぎますと、次の守る側としての3戦は大変になりますよ
そうね。しっかり休憩してからサディア艦隊のいる海域に行きましょ？
（パシャッ！）
「合同演習の瞬間：風に挑むアイリス艦隊」…うんうん、いい感じ！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: わあ！結構かっこよく決まってる…！アルフレード、これ、賞が獲れるかも！
うちもそう思う！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: （……写真を撮ってる…？）
うちはジャーナリストでサディア帝国艦隊演習メンバーのアルフレード・オリアーニだよ！こっちはキャプテン・ポンペイとジュゼッペ・ガリバルディだ！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: ご機嫌よう
平和間奏曲.actorName: ジュゼッペ・ガリバルディ

平和間奏曲.say: さあ、ここからは偉大なるキャプテン・ボンベイがあなたたちの相手をする！
アイリスの挑戦者たち、この輝ける刃を見るがいい！
……輝ける…刃？
うん！ええと…ほら、リシュリュー様と戦闘天使たちが武器をピカーって光らせて敵を倒したりするんでしょ？
……こう？
そうそう！
（パシャッ！）
「合同演習の瞬間：光る刃を見せる護教騎士」、確保！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: ……はぁ…緊張感ないわね…
それに「挑戦者」って…ここはアイリスの海域よ？そっちが挑戦者じゃないの？
うん！いいアオリ！その力、戦場で見せてもらうわ！
（うわぁ……よわっ）
偉大なるキャプテン・ポンペイが負けるなんて！
お互い一歩も引かない、長く激しい戦いだった！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: …スコアだとこっちの圧勝だけど…？
勝敗なんて二の次！重要なのは仲良くすること！へーきへーき！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: はーい、最初にやられたアルフレードは帰ったら補習だよー
平和間奏曲.actorName: ジュゼッペ・ガリバルディ

平和間奏曲.say: わわ！今のはわざと負けただけよ！次の時は本気を出すから！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: 必勝の秘密作戦だって準備したし！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: （秘密作戦……？ワクワク）
すごく楽しいから首をながーくして待ってて！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: はいはい、楽しみにさせてもらうわ
うんうん！じゃあまた後でー！
平和間奏曲.actorName: アルフレード・オリアーニ

平和間奏曲.say: サディア艦隊は陣形を立て直し、演習海域から離脱した。
こうして、アイリスの第一ラウンドの戦いは無事に終わりを告げた。

sequence: アイリス・モンサンミッシェル
聖堂施設　指揮官用控室

会談.say: 演習海域に展開している無人機から、戦いの様子が絶え間なくこちらに送られてきている。
そして、戦術分析システムでその情報が解析され、モニターに戦況がリアルタイムで反映されている。
今はアイリス艦隊と鉄血艦隊が五分五分で戦っている模様だ。
さすがは近代化改修ね。ちょっと旧式の巡洋艦でも、近代化改修されたら巡洋戦艦に肉薄できるなんて
ユニオンにもそういった集中運用された艦隊があるといいわね
（改造、そして「Ⅱ」型艤装か……たしかに共通点はあるが…）
（「Ⅱ」型艤装は技術的に普及させることが難しく、戦闘力を上げるだけなら近代化改修を拡大するか、特殊装備を開発するなどが現実的だ…）
（ん？あそこにいるのは…ストラスブール？）
（「偽神事件」でリシュリューに連絡がなかったが、ここにいたのか……？）
（見た感じなんだかソワソワしているな。演習に集中していないように見える）
（リシュリューがここにいるせいでストレスを感じているのかな？）
（トントン）
どちら様？
ビスマルクからの伝言だ。よければ一緒に演習を観戦しないか、だそうだ
（…演習観戦、か。そろそろ接触があるだろうと思ってたが、ビスマルクにしては理由が地味だな）
――もちろんだ。ブリュンヒルデ、案内を頼めるか？
聖堂施設　ビスマルクの控室
ああ。指揮官、気を楽にしてくれ
南極での一件以来か？確かに
そうだな。鉄血の指導者と「アズールレーン」の指揮官という立場は置いておくとしよう
――その姿で来たってことは…ゲリュオンに何か問題でもあったのか？
別に大丈夫よ、「Zwei」艤装もゲリュオンも問題ないわ
この姿は融和的な態度を示すためよ。イメージ戦略だと思ってくれて構わない
ここはあくまでアイリスの領域だから
――その割に戦力に抜かりがないね。それもイメージ戦略の一環？
違うわ
陣営間の理解を深める演習だから、こっちも手の内をある程度見せないと変な憶測を引き起こしてしまうでしょ？
――手の内を見せる、か。…親睦を深める以上に意義があるのだな
そうでなければわざわざこっちに出向かわない。それに同盟の話もあるわ
――エウロパ陣営の攻守同盟だな……？
鋭いわね
セイレーンとの戦い、少なくともオブザーバーを始めとした「実験」機関との戦いは終盤よ。その後のことを考慮しなければならないわ
――「アズールレーン」の再結成か
それもあるけど、それだけじゃないわ
もし再結成だけですべてが上手くいくなら、そもそも「レッドアクシズ」はいらなかったはずよ
――今は状況が違う。少なくとも共通の敵が表に出ているはずだ
昔にもね
アイリスの会議だけでは再結成が叶わないと思ったからこそ、あなたは私に会いに来たんでしょう？
――ああ。今の「アズールレーン」ではなく、全陣営の力をまとめて未来に立ち向かう、真の共同戦線が必要だ
……「アズールレーン」という名称にこだわる必要はあるのか？
――「アズールレーン」はただの名称ではない。一つの「概念」にして「伝承」だ
――だからそれは……「アズールレーン」であるべきだ
相変わらず正直ね。指揮官の想いはよく伝わったわ
――そうか？てっきり試されているんだと思ったよ
いや、「演習を観戦しながら雑談に興じる」だけよ
それにしても、「枝」の実験担当たちとの戦いは終盤だって言ったとき…反論しなかったわね
――そうだな。やつらの戦力は依然として強大だし、謎もまだ山積みだが…
コンパイラーだけでなく、オブザーバーの「主機」の場所はすでに分かっている
――だから一致団結できれば、真正面から戦っても破壊することができる
――オブザーバーさえ稼働停止させられれば、残りの上位個体たちは指揮を失って弱体化するはずだ
そうね。でもどう実現するつもり？
――というと？
流れに身を任せ、機を見て一気に打って出る？それともあなたさえ望めば、セイレーンたちを泳がせて……
――いや、セイレーンによる被害を放置するなんて論外だ
あなたならそう言うと思ったわ。たしかにそれはそうね
――もしかして……それはまさか……
